Alle Daten sind fiktiv, jedoch ist die Seite so aufgabeut, dass reale Daten einfach importiert werden könnten.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eBitte kommt mit Feedback und Vorschlägen gerne per Whatsapp oder im Traning auf mich zu.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003e  Cheers, Chris\u003c/p\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                Letzte Events\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cul class=\"list-group\" id=\"latestEvents\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003c!-- Will be populated via JavaScript --\u003e\r\n                \u003c/ul\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Add JavaScript for latest events --\u003e\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n",

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block title %}Home{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n\u003c!--h1\u003eBowling Dashboard\u003c/h1--\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                Info\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                \u003c!-- We'll add stats here later --\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eDiese Seite ist ein Proof of Concept zur Darstellung von Ergebnissen und Statistiken rund um Bowling Ligen, Tuniere und Pokalwettbewerbe.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eDie Auswertungen sind oben über die Navigation zu \"League Stats\" und \"Player Stats\" zu finden.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eHauptaugenmerk liegt derzeit auf den Ligastatistiken. Alle Daten sind fiktiv, jedoch ist die Seite so aufgabeut, dass reale Daten einfach importiert werden könnten.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eBitte kommt mit Feedback und Vorschlägen gerne per Whatsapp oder im Traning auf mich zu.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003e  Cheers, Chris\u003c/p\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                Letzte Events\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cul class=\"list-group\" id=\"latestEvents\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003c!-- Will be populated via JavaScript --\u003e\r\n                \u003c/ul\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Add JavaScript for latest events --\u003e\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n",
        "range": {

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    console.log('🔄 Loading latest events with database:', getCurrentDatabase());\r\n    \r\n    // Use fetchWithDatabase to include the database parameter\r\n    fetchWithDatabase('{{ url_for(\"league.get_latest_events\") }}')\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('✅ Latest events loaded:', data);\r\n            const eventsList = document.getElementById('latestEvents');\r\n            if (data \u0026\u0026 Array.isArray(data)) {\r\n                eventsList.innerHTML = data.map(event =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cli class=\"list-group-item\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003ca href=\"{{ url_for('league.stats') }}?season=${encodeURIComponent(event.Season)}\u0026league=${encodeURIComponent(event.League)}\u0026week=${event.Week}\u0026database=${encodeURIComponent(getCurrentDatabase())}\" \r\n                           class=\"text-decoration-none\"\u003e\r\n                            ${event.Season} - ${event.League} - Woche ${event.Week}\r\n                            \u003csmall class=\"text-muted\"\u003e(${event.Date})\u003c/small\u003e\r\n                        \u003c/a\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/li\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n            } else {\r\n                eventsList.innerHTML = '\u003cli class=\"list-group-item\"\u003eKeine Events gefunden\u003c/li\u003e';\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('❌ Error fetching events:', error);\r\n            const eventsList = document.getElementById('latestEvents');\r\n            eventsList.innerHTML = '\u003cli class=\"list-group-item text-danger\"\u003eFehler beim Laden der Events\u003c/li\u003e';\r\n        });\r\n});\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n{% endblock %} ",
        "detailedLines": [

        ],
        "originalContents": "document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    console.log('🔄 Loading latest events with database:', getCurrentDatabase());\r\n    \r\n    // Use fetchWithDatabase to include the database parameter\r\n    fetchWithDatabase('{{ url_for(\"league.get_latest_events\") }}')\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('✅ Latest events loaded:', data);\r\n            const eventsList = document.getElementById('latestEvents');\r\n            if (data \u0026\u0026 Array.isArray(data)) {\r\n                eventsList.innerHTML = data.map(event =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cli class=\"list-group-item\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003ca href=\"{{ url_for('league.stats') }}?season=${encodeURIComponent(event.Season)}\u0026league=${encodeURIComponent(event.League)}\u0026week=${event.Week}\u0026database=${encodeURIComponent(getCurrentDatabase())}\" \r\n                           class=\"text-decoration-none\"\u003e\r\n                            ${event.Season} - ${event.League} - Woche ${event.Week}\r\n                            \u003csmall class=\"text-muted\"\u003e(${event.Date})\u003c/small\u003e\r\n                        \u003c/a\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/li\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n            } else {\r\n                eventsList.innerHTML = '\u003cli class=\"list-group-item\"\u003eKeine Events gefunden\u003c/li\u003e';\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('❌ Error fetching events:', error);\r\n            const eventsList = document.getElementById('latestEvents');\r\n            eventsList.innerHTML = '\u003cli class=\"list-group-item text-danger\"\u003eFehler beim Laden der Events\u003c/li\u003e';\r\n        });\r\n});\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n{% endblock %} ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 15,
            "line": 72
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 41
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/index.html"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get_latest_events')\r\ndef get_latest_events():\r\n    try:\r\n        # Get limit parameter with default value of 5\r\n        limit = request.args.get('limit', default=10, type=int)\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Latest Events - Received request with limit={limit}\")\r\n        \r\n        # Validate limit\r\n        if limit \u003c= 0:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Limit must be greater than 0'}), 400\r\n            \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        events = league_service.get_latest_events(limit=limit)\r\n        #print(\"league_routes.get_latest_events\")\r\n        #print(events)\r\n        print(f\"Found {len(events)} latest events\")\r\n        return jsonify(events)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_latest_events: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(traceback.format_exc())\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_league_performance_chart(self, season: str, league: str, team_id: Optional[str] = None) -\u003e PlotData:\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        # Weeks completed tile\r\n        if standings.teams and standings.teams[0].weekly_performances:\r\n            completed_weeks = len(set(p.week for p in standings.teams[0].weekly_performances))\r\n            tiles.append(\r\n                TileData(\r\n                    title=\"Weeks Completed\",\r\n                    value=str(completed_weeks),\r\n                    subtitle=f\"of {completed_weeks + 2}\",  # Assuming 2 more weeks to go\r\n                    type=\"progress\",\r\n                    chart_data=[completed_weeks, completed_weeks + 2]\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        return tiles\r\n    \r\n    def get_latest_events(self, limit: int = 5) -\u003e List[Dict[str, Any]]:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Get the latest league events.\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            limit: Maximum number of events to return\r\n            \r\n        Returns:\r\n            List of event dictionaries\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        # Get all events from the adapter\r\n        events_df = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            filters={},\r\n            sort_by=\"Date\",\r\n            ascending=False,\r\n            limit=limit\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # If no events, return empty list\r\n        if events_df.empty:\r\n            return []\r\n        \r\n        # Convert to list of dictionaries\r\n        events = []\r\n        for _, row in events_df.iterrows():\r\n            event = {}\r\n            for col in [\"Season\", \"League\", \"Week\", \"Date\"]:\r\n                if col in row:\r\n                    event[col] = row[col]\r\n            events.append(event)\r\n        \r\n        return events\r\n\r\n    def get_weeks(self, league_name: str = None, season: str = None) -\u003e List[int]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get available weeks for a league and season\"\"\"\r\n        #if not league_name or not season:\r\n            # Return empty list if parameters are missing\r\n        #    return []\r\n        return self.adapter.get_weeks(season, league_name)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class TeamStatsApp {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    async _doInitialize() {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Signal that we're taking control to prevent legacy conflicts\r\n            window.teamStatsApp = this;\r\n            this.isInitialized = true;\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize URL state manager with content rendering callback\r\n            this.urlStateManager = new URLStateManager({\r\n                onStateChange: (state) =\u003e {\r\n                    console.log('🔄 URLStateManager: State changed:', state);\r\n                    if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                        this.contentRenderer.renderContent(state);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize event system\r\n            this.eventBus = window.EventBus;\r\n            this.smartEventRouter = new SmartEventRouter(this.eventBus);\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize content renderer\r\n            this.contentRenderer = new ContentRenderer(this.urlStateManager, this.eventBus, this.smartEventRouter);\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize filter manager with a short delay to ensure DOM is ready\r\n            await new Promise(resolve =\u003e setTimeout(resolve, 100));\r\n            \r\n            this.filterManager = new FilterManager(this.urlStateManager, this.eventBus, this.smartEventRouter);\r\n            await this.filterManager.initialize();\r\n            \r\n            // Set up our own event listeners that properly trigger state changes\r\n            this.setupEventListeners();\r\n            \r\n            console.log('✅ TeamStatsApp initialized successfully');",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    async _doInitialize() {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Signal that we're taking control to prevent legacy conflicts\r\n            window.teamStatsApp = this;\r\n            this.isInitialized = true;\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize URL state manager with content rendering callback\r\n            this.urlStateManager = new URLStateManager({\r\n                onStateChange: (state) =\u003e {\r\n                    console.log('🔄 URLStateManager: State changed:', state);\r\n                    if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                        this.contentRenderer.renderContent(state);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize event system\r\n            this.eventBus = window.EventBus;\r\n            this.smartEventRouter = new SmartEventRouter(this.eventBus);\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize content renderer\r\n            this.contentRenderer = new ContentRenderer(this.urlStateManager, this.eventBus, this.smartEventRouter);\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize filter manager with a short delay to ensure DOM is ready\r\n            await new Promise(resolve =\u003e setTimeout(resolve, 100));\r\n            \r\n            this.filterManager = new FilterManager(this.urlStateManager, this.eventBus, this.smartEventRouter);\r\n            await this.filterManager.initialize();\r\n            \r\n            // Set up our own event listeners that properly trigger state changes\r\n            this.setupEventListeners();\r\n            \r\n            console.log('✅ TeamStatsApp initialized successfully');",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n\u003c!-- Existing player selection card --\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n        \u003ch4\u003ePlayer Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"mb-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003clabel for=\"playerInput\" class=\"form-label\"\u003eSelect Player\u003c/label\u003e\r\n            \u003cinput \r\n                type=\"text\" \r\n                class=\"form-control\" \r\n                id=\"playerInput\" \r\n                list=\"playerList\" \r\n                placeholder=\"Type a player name...\"\r\n                autocomplete=\"off\"\r\n            \u003e\r\n            \u003cdatalist id=\"playerList\"\u003e\r\n                \u003c!-- Players will be loaded here --\u003e\r\n            \u003c/datalist\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"playerStats\" class=\"mt-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003c!-- Basic player info will be here --\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Lifetime Stats Card --\u003e\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "{% block content %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\u003c!-- Existing player selection card --\u003e\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"mb-4\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "            \u003clabel for=\"playerInput\" class=\"form-label\"\u003eSelect Player\u003c/label\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "            \u003cinput \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "                type=\"text\" \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "                class=\"form-control\" \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "                id=\"playerInput\" \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "                list=\"playerList\" \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "                placeholder=\"Type a player name...\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "                autocomplete=\"off\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "            \u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "            \u003cdatalist id=\"playerList\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "                \u003c!-- Players will be loaded here --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "            \u003c/datalist\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv id=\"playerStats\" class=\"mt-4\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "            \u003c!-- Basic player info will be here --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\u003c!-- Lifetime Stats Card --\u003e\r"

            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    "

        ],
        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n\u003c!-- Existing player selection card --\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n        \u003ch4\u003ePlayer Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"mb-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003clabel for=\"playerInput\" class=\"form-label\"\u003eSelect Player\u003c/label\u003e\r\n            \u003cinput \r\n                type=\"text\" \r\n                class=\"form-control\" \r\n                id=\"playerInput\" \r\n                list=\"playerList\" \r\n                placeholder=\"Type a player name...\"\r\n                autocomplete=\"off\"\r\n            \u003e\r\n            \u003cdatalist id=\"playerList\"\u003e\r\n                \u003c!-- Players will be loaded here --\u003e\r\n            \u003c/datalist\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"playerStats\" class=\"mt-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003c!-- Basic player info will be here --\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Lifetime Stats Card --\u003e\r\n",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\n            \u003ch4\u003eBesondere Momente \n                \u003cspan class=\"badge bg-success ms-2\"\u003eContent Block\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003c/h4\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\n                \u003c!-- Highest Scores Section --\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6 mb-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\n                        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n                            \u003ch5 class=\"card-title\"\u003eHöchste Ergebnisse\u003c/h5\u003e\n                            \u003ctable class=\"table table-sm\"\u003e\n                                \u003cthead\u003e\n                                    \u003ctr\u003e\n                                        \u003cth\u003eScore\u003c/th\u003e\n                                        \u003cth\u003eEvent\u003c/th\u003e\n                                        \u003cth\u003eGegner\u003c/th\u003e\n                                    \u003c/tr\u003e\n                                \u003c/thead\u003e\n                                \u003ctbody id=\"highestScoresBody\"\u003e\n                                    \u003c!-- Will be populated by JavaScript --\u003e\n                                \u003c/tbody\u003e\n                            \u003c/table\u003e\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n\n                \u003c!-- Lowest Scores Section --\u003e\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\n            \u003ch4\u003eBesondere Momente \n                \u003cspan class=\"badge bg-success ms-2\"\u003eContent Block\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003c/h4\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\n                \u003c!-- Highest Scores Section --\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6 mb-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\n                        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n                            \u003ch5 class=\"card-title\"\u003eHöchste Ergebnisse\u003c/h5\u003e\n                            \u003ctable class=\"table table-sm\"\u003e\n                                \u003cthead\u003e\n                                    \u003ctr\u003e\n                                        \u003cth\u003eScore\u003c/th\u003e\n                                        \u003cth\u003eEvent\u003c/th\u003e\n                                        \u003cth\u003eGegner\u003c/th\u003e\n                                    \u003c/tr\u003e\n                                \u003c/thead\u003e\n                                \u003ctbody id=\"highestScoresBody\"\u003e\n                                    \u003c!-- Will be populated by JavaScript --\u003e\n                                \u003c/tbody\u003e\n                            \u003c/table\u003e\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n\n                \u003c!-- Lowest Scores Section --\u003e\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * Content Renderer - Phase 3 Version\n * \n * Updated to use content blocks instead of legacy functions\n * Gradual migration: starts with team history and league comparison blocks\n */\n\nclass ContentRenderer {\n    constructor(urlStateManager, eventBus = null, smartEventRouter = null) {\n        this.urlStateManager = urlStateManager;\n        this.eventBus = eventBus || window.EventBus;\n        this.smartEventRouter = smartEventRouter;\n        this.lastRenderedState = {};\n        this.isRendering = false;\n        \n        // Content blocks registry\n        this.contentBlocks = {};\n        \n        // Initialize content blocks\n        this.initializeContentBlocks();\n        \n        // Content modes based on filter combinations\n        this.contentModes = {\n            'no-selection': {\n                title: 'Team Overview',\n                description: 'Select a team to view detailed statistics',\n                blocks: []\n            },\n            'team-only': {\n                title: 'Team Complete History',\n                description: 'All seasons overview',\n                blocks: ['team-history', 'league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']\n            },\n            'team-season': {\n                title: 'Team Season Analysis',\n                description: 'Detailed season performance',\n                blocks: ['team-history', 'league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']\n            },\n            'team-season-week': {\n                title: 'Team Week Performance',\n                description: 'Week-specific analysis',\n                blocks: ['team-history', 'league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']\n            }\n        };\n    }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": " * Content Renderer - Phase 3 Version"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": " * "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": " * Updated to use content blocks instead of legacy functions"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": " * Gradual migration: starts with team history and league comparison blocks"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "class ContentRenderer {"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,

        "originalContents": "/**\n * Content Renderer - Phase 3 Version\n * \n * Updated to use content blocks instead of legacy functions\n * Gradual migration: starts with team history and league comparison blocks\n */\n\nclass ContentRenderer {\n    constructor(urlStateManager, eventBus = null, smartEventRouter = null) {\n        this.urlStateManager = urlStateManager;\n        this.eventBus = eventBus || window.EventBus;\n        this.smartEventRouter = smartEventRouter;\n        this.lastRenderedState = {};\n        this.isRendering = false;\n        \n        // Content blocks registry\n        this.contentBlocks = {};\n        \n        // Initialize content blocks\n        this.initializeContentBlocks();\n        \n        // Content modes based on filter combinations\n        this.contentModes = {\n            'no-selection': {\n                title: 'Team Overview',\n                description: 'Select a team to view detailed statistics',\n                blocks: []\n            },\n            'team-only': {\n                title: 'Team Complete History',\n                description: 'All seasons overview',\n                blocks: ['team-history', 'league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']\n            },\n            'team-season': {\n                title: 'Team Season Analysis',\n                description: 'Detailed season performance',\n                blocks: ['team-history', 'league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']\n            },\n            'team-season-week': {\n                title: 'Team Week Performance',\n                description: 'Week-specific analysis',\n                blocks: ['team-history', 'league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']\n            }\n        };\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 329
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/static/js/core/content-renderer.js"
      },
      "score": 0.1777344048023224
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {

   \u003ch5 class=\"card-title\"\u003eSeason Records\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                        \u003ctable class=\"table table-sm\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003ctbody\u003e\r\n                                \u003ctr\u003e\u003cth\u003eBest Season:\u003c/th\u003e\u003ctd id=\"bestSeason\"\u003e-\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                                \u003ctr\u003e\u003cth\u003eMost Improved:\u003c/th\u003e\u003ctd id=\"mostImproved\"\u003e-\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                            \u003c/tbody\u003e\r\n                        \u003c/table\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Season Stats Card --\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n        \u003ch4\u003eSeason Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"seasonStats\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ctable class=\"table table-striped\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cthead\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eSeason\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eGames\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eTotal Pins\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eAverage\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eDev. from Avg\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003evs Last Season\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eBest Game\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eWorst Game\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                \u003c/thead\u003e\r\n                \u003ctbody id=\"seasonStatsBody\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003c!-- Season stats will be populated here --\u003e\r\n                \u003c/tbody\u003e\r\n            \u003c/table\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Existing trend chart card --\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"card mt-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n",

Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"seasonStats\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ctable class=\"table \u003cth\u003eGames\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eTotal Pins\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eAverage\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eDev. from Avg\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003evs Last Season\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eBest Game\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eWorst Game\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                \u003c/thead\u003e\r\n                \u003ctbody id=\"seasonStatsBody\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003c!-- Season stats will be populated here --\u003e\r\n                \u003c/tbody\u003e\r\n            \u003c/table\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# Filter Combinations Matrix\r\n\r\n## Quick Reference: What Shows When\r\n\r\n| Filters Selected | Primary Content Block | Key Components Displayed |\r\n|------------------|----------------------|---------------------------|\r\n| **League Only** | LeagueAggregationBlock | • League averages over time\u003cbr/\u003e• Points to win history\u003cbr/\u003e• All-time top performers\u003cbr/\u003e• Record games |\r\n| **League + Season** | LeagueSeasonOverviewBlock | • Season timetable\u003cbr/\u003e• Final standings\u003cbr/\u003e• Season progress charts\u003cbr/\u003e• Individual averages |\r\n| **League + Season + Week** | MatchDayBlock | • Week standings\u003cbr/\u003e• Honor scores for week |\r\n| **League + Season + Week + Team** | TeamDetailsBlock | • Team score sheet (3 views)\u003cbr/\u003e• Player details for week |\r\n| **League + Season + Team** | TeamSeasonBlock | • Team season history\u003cbr/\u003e• Team-specific charts\u003cbr/\u003e• Season progress for team |\r\n\r\n## Data Flow Architecture\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nUser Selects Filters\r\n        ↓\r\nFilter State Updated\r\n        ↓\r\nContent Blocks Check shouldRender()\r\n        ↓\r\nMatching Block Loads Data\r\n        ↓\r\nAPI Calls with Filtered Parameters\r\n        ↓\r\nComponents Render with Data\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## Implementation Status\r\n\r\n### ✅ Currently Working (Phase 1)\r\n- League + Season + Week (MatchDayBlock)\r\n- League + Season + Week + Team (TeamDetailsBlock)\r\n- Basic League + Season (partial LeagueSeasonOverviewBlock)\r\n\r\n### 🚧 Needs Backend Endpoints (Phase 2)\r\n- League Only (LeagueAggregationBlock)\r\n- Complete League + Season (missing timetable, averages)\r\n- League + Season + Team (TeamSeasonBlock - not created yet)\r\n\r\n### 📋 Next Steps\r\n1. **Create missing backend endpoints** for aggregation data\r\n2. **Implement TeamSeasonBlock** for team season analysis\r\n3. **Remove debugging logs** once system is stable\r\n4. **Add loading states** for better UX\r\n\r\n## Filter Validation Rules\r\n\r\n### Valid Combinations\r\n- ✅ League only\r\n- ✅ League + Season  \r\n- ✅ League + Season + Week\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Filter Combinations Matrix\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## Quick Reference: What Shows When\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "| Filters Selected | Primary Content Block | Key Components Displayed |\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "|------------------|----------------------|---------------------------|\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "| **League Only** | LeagueAggregationBlock | • League averages over time\u003cbr/\u003e• Points to win history\u003cbr/\u003e• All-time top performers\u003cbr/\u003e• Record games |\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "| **League + Season** | LeagueSeasonOverviewBlock | • Season timetable\u003cbr/\u003e• Final standings\u003cbr/\u003e• Season progress charts\u003cbr/\u003e• Individual averages |\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "| **League + Season + Week** | MatchDayBlock | • Week standings\u003cbr/\u003e• Honor scores for week |\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "| **League + Season + Week + Team** | TeamDetailsBlock | • Team score sheet (3 views)\u003cbr/\u003e• Player details for week |\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "| **League + Season + Team** | TeamSeasonBlock | • Team season history\u003cbr/\u003e• Team-specific charts\u003cbr/\u003e• Season progress for team |\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "## Data Flow Architecture\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "User Selects Filters\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "Filter State Updated\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "Content Blocks Check shouldRender()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "Matching Block Loads Data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "API Calls with Filtered Parameters\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "Components Render with Data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "## Implementation Status\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "### ✅ Currently Working (Phase 1)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "- League + Season + Week (MatchDayBlock)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "- League + Season + Week + Team (TeamDetailsBlock)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "- Basic League + Season (partial LeagueSeasonOverviewBlock)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "### 🚧 Needs Backend Endpoints (Phase 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "- League Only (LeagueAggregationBlock)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "- Complete League + Season (missing timetable, averages)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "- League + Season + Team (TeamSeasonBlock - not created yet)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "### 📋 Next Steps\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "1. **Create missing backend endpoints** for aggregation data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "2. **Implement TeamSeasonBlock** for team season analysis\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "3. **Remove debugging logs** once system is stable\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "4. **Add loading states** for better UX\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "## Filter Validation Rules\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "### Valid Combinations\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "- ✅ League only\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "- ✅ League + Season  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "- ✅ League + Season + Week\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "- ✅ League + Season + Week + Team\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# Filter Combinations Matrix\r\n\r\n## Quick Reference: What Shows When\r\n\r\n| Filters Selected | Primary Content Block | Key Components Displayed |\r\n|------------------|----------------------|---------------------------|\r\n| **League Only** | LeagueAggregationBlock | • League averages over time\u003cbr/\u003e• Points to win history\u003cbr/\u003e• All-time top performers\u003cbr/\u003e• Record games |\r\n| **League + Season** | LeagueSeasonOverviewBlock | • Season timetable\u003cbr/\u003e• Final standings\u003cbr/\u003e• Season progress charts\u003cbr/\u003e• Individual averages |\r\n| **League + Season + Week** | MatchDayBlock | • Week standings\u003cbr/\u003e• Honor scores for week |\r\n| **League + Season + Week + Team** | TeamDetailsBlock | • Team score sheet (3 views)\u003cbr/\u003e• Player details for week |\r\n| **League + Season + Team** | TeamSeasonBlock | • Team season history\u003cbr/\u003e• Team-specific charts\u003cbr/\u003e• Season progress for team |\r\n\r\n## Data Flow Architecture\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nUser Selects Filters\r\n        ↓\r\nFilter State Updated\r\n        ↓\r\nContent Blocks Check shouldRender()\r\n        ↓\r\nMatching Block Loads Data\r\n        ↓\r\nAPI Calls with Filtered Parameters\r\n        ↓\r\nComponents Render with Data\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## Implementation Status\r\n\r\n### ✅ Currently Working (Phase 1)\r\n- League + Season + Week (MatchDayBlock)\r\n- League + Season + Week + Team (TeamDetailsBlock)\r\n- Basic League + Season (partial LeagueSeasonOverviewBlock)\r\n\r\n### 🚧 Needs Backend Endpoints (Phase 2)\r\n- League Only (LeagueAggregationBlock)\r\n- Complete League + Season (missing timetable, averages)\r\n- League + Season + Team (TeamSeasonBlock - not created yet)\r\n\r\n### 📋 Next Steps\r\n1. **Create missing backend endpoints** for aggregation data\r\n2. **Implement TeamSeasonBlock** for team season analysis\r\n3. **Remove debugging logs** once system is stable\r\n4. **Add loading states** for better UX\r\n\r\n## Filter Validation Rules\r\n\r\n### Valid Combinations\r\n- ✅ League only\r\n- ✅ League + Season  \r\n- ✅ League + Season + Week\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 53
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "docs/FILTER_COMBINATIONS_MATRIX.md"
      },
      "score": 0.17333984375
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class ContentRenderer {\n\n    \n    ...\n\n    \n    /**\n     * Render content blocks for the current mode\n     */\n    async renderContentBlocks(mode, state) {\n        const modeConfig = this.contentModes[mode];\n        console.log(&#96;ContentRenderer: Rendering blocks for ${mode}:&#96;, modeConfig.blocks);\n        \n        if (mode === 'no-selection') {\n            // Clear all content areas when no team selected\n            this.clearAllContent();\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        // Render blocks based on mode configuration\n        const renderPromises = [];\n        \n        // Phase 3: Use content blocks for team-history and league-comparison\n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('team-history') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['team-history']) {\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['team-history'].renderWithData(state));\n        }\n        \n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('league-comparison') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['league-comparison']) {\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['league-comparison'].renderWithData(state));\n        }\n        \n        // Phase 3: Use content block for clutch analysis\n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('clutch-analysis') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['clutch-analysis']) {\n            console.log('ContentRenderer: Adding clutch-analysis block to render queue');\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['clutch-analysis'].renderWithData(state));\n        } else {\n            console.log('ContentRenderer: Clutch analysis block skipped - included:', modeConfig.blocks.includes('clutch-analysis'), 'available:', !!this.contentBlocks['clutch-analysis']);\n        }\n        \n        // Phase 3: Use content block for consistency metrics\n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('consistency-metrics') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['consistency-metrics']) {\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['consistency-metrics'].renderWithData(state));\n        }",

        "originalContents": "\n    \n    /**\n     * Render content blocks for the current mode\n     */\n    async renderContentBlocks(mode, state) {\n        const modeConfig = this.contentModes[mode];\n        console.log(&#96;ContentRenderer: Rendering blocks for ${mode}:&#96;, modeConfig.blocks);\n        \n        if (mode === 'no-selection') {\n            // Clear all content areas when no team selected\n            this.clearAllContent();\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        // Render blocks based on mode configuration\n        const renderPromises = [];\n        \n        // Phase 3: Use content blocks for team-history and league-comparison\n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('team-history') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['team-history']) {\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['team-history'].renderWithData(state));\n        }\n        \n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('league-comparison') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['league-comparison']) {\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['league-comparison'].renderWithData(state));\n        }\n        \n        // Phase 3: Use content block for clutch analysis\n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('clutch-analysis') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['clutch-analysis']) {\n            console.log('ContentRenderer: Adding clutch-analysis block to render queue');\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['clutch-analysis'].renderWithData(state));\n        } else {\n            console.log('ContentRenderer: Clutch analysis block skipped - included:', modeConfig.blocks.includes('clutch-analysis'), 'available:', !!this.contentBlocks['clutch-analysis']);\n        }\n        \n        // Phase 3: Use content block for consistency metrics\n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('consistency-metrics') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['consistency-metrics']) {\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['consistency-metrics'].renderWithData(state));\n        }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block title %}API Test Page{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n{% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n{% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"container-fluid\"\u003e\r\n    \u003ch1 class=\"mb-4\"\u003eAPI Test Page\u003c/h1\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch4\u003eSelection Controls\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSeason\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eLeague\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsLeague\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Leagues will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eWeek\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsWeek\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Weeks will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-12\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsTeam\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Teams will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- League Routes Card --\u003e\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

Handle week range\r\n            if self.min_week is not None and self.max_week is not None:\r\n                # Between min and max\r\n                filters[Columns.week] = {'value': list(range(self.min_week, self.max_week + 1)), 'operator': 'in'}\r\n            elif self.min_week is not None:\r\n                # Greater than or equal to min\r\n                filters[Columns.week] = {'value': self.min_week, 'operator': 'ge'}\r\n            elif self.max_week is not None:\r\n                # Less than or equal to max\r\n                filters[Columns.week] = {'value': self.max_week, 'operator': 'le'}\r\n        \r\n        if self.team:\r\n            filters[Columns.team_name] = {'value': self.team, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        \r\n        if self.computed_data is not None:\r\n            filters[Columns.computed_data] = {'value': self.computed_data, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        \r\n        return filters",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import pandas as pd\r\n\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nclass DataAdapter(ABC):\r\n    \"\"\"Abstract base class for data adapters\"\"\"\r\n    \r\n    # Define standard operators that all adapters should support\r\n    OPERATORS = {\r\n        \"eq\": \"Equal to\",\r\n        \"ne\": \"Not equal to\",\r\n        \"lt\": \"Less than\",\r\n        \"le\": \"Less than or equal to\",\r\n        \"gt\": \"Greater than\",\r\n        \"ge\": \"Greater than or equal to\",\r\n        \"in\": \"In list\",\r\n        \"not_in\": \"Not in list\",\r\n        \"contains\": \"String contains\",\r\n        \"startswith\": \"String starts with\",\r\n        \"endswith\": \"String ends with\"\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_player_data(self, player_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get player data for a specific season\"\"\"\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_all_players(self) -\u003e List[str]:\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_filtered_data(self, filters: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get filtered data based on provided filters\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            filters: Dictionary of column names to filter dictionaries\r\n                   Each filter dictionary should have:\r\n                   - 'value': The value to filter by\r\n                   - 'operator': The operator to use (must be one of OPERATORS keys)\r\n        \r\n        Returns:\r\n            DataFrame containing the filtered data\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_league_standings(self, league_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get league standings for a specific season\"\"\"\r\n        pass",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import pandas as pd\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "from abc import ABC, abstractmethod\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\r"

            "text": "\r"

            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "class DataAdapter(ABC):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Abstract base class for data adapters\"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    # Define standard operators that all adapters should support\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    OPERATORS = {\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        \"eq\": \"Equal to\",\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\n\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nclass DataAdapter(ABC):\r\n    \"\"\"Abstract base class for data adapters\"\"\"\r\n    \r\n    # Define standard operators that all adapters should support\r\n    OPERATORS = {\r\n        \"eq\": \"Equal to\",\r\n        \"ne\": \"Not equal to\",\r\n        \"lt\": \"Less than\",\r\n        \"le\": \"Less than or equal to\",\r\n        \"gt\": \"Greater than\",\r\n        \"ge\": \"Greater than or equal to\",\r\n        \"in\": \"In list\",\r\n        \"not_in\": \"Not in list\",\r\n        \"contains\": \"String contains\",\r\n        \"startswith\": \"String starts with\",\r\n        \"endswith\": \"String ends with\"\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_player_data(self, player_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get player data for a specific season\"\"\"\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_all_players(self) -\u003e List[str]:\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_filtered_data(self, filters: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get filtered data based on provided filters\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            filters: Dictionary of column names to filter dictionaries\r\n                   Each filter dictionary should have:\r\n                   - 'value': The value to filter by\r\n                   - 'operator': The operator to use (must be one of OPERATORS keys)\r\n        \r\n        Returns:\r\n            DataFrame containing the filtered data\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_league_standings(self, league_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get league standings for a specific season\"\"\"\r\n        pass",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 69
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "data_access/adapters/data_adapter.py"
      },
      "score": 0.32666015625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/test-database-param')\r\ndef test_database_param():\r\n    \"\"\"Test route to verify database parameter is passed correctly through all layers\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        from app.config.database_config import database_config\r\n        \r\n        database = request.args.get('database')\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: test-database-param called with database={database}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not database:\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': 'No database parameter provided'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Validate database exists\r\n        if not database_config.validate_source(database):\r\n            available = database_config.get_available_sources()\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': f'Invalid database: {database}. Available: {available}'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Test the full chain: Route -\u003e Service -\u003e Server -\u003e DataAdapterFactory -\u003e DataAdapterPandas\r\n        from app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\n        from business_logic.server import Server\r\n        from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Testing database chain with: {database}\")\r\n        \r\n        # Test LeagueService\r\n        league_service = LeagueService(database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Test Server\r\n        server = Server(database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Test DataAdapterFactory\r\n        adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Get some basic data to verify it's working\r\n        seasons = league_service.get_seasons()\r\n        leagues = league_service.get_leagues()\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Successfully retrieved {len(seasons)} seasons and {len(leagues)} leagues\")",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/test-database-param')\r\ndef test_database_param():\r\n    \"\"\"Test route to verify database parameter is passed correctly through all layers\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        from app.config.database_config import database_config\r\n        \r\n        database = request.args.get('database')\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: test-database-param called with database={database}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not database:\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': 'No database parameter provided'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Validate database exists\r\n        if not database_config.validate_source(database):\r\n            available = database_config.get_available_sources()\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': f'Invalid database: {database}. Available: {available}'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Test the full chain: Route -\u003e Service -\u003e Server -\u003e DataAdapterFactory -\u003e DataAdapterPandas\r\n        from app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\n        from business_logic.server import Server\r\n        from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Testing database chain with: {database}\")\r\n        \r\n        # Test LeagueService\r\n        league_service = LeagueService(database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Test Server\r\n        server = Server(database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Test DataAdapterFactory\r\n        adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Get some basic data to verify it's working\r\n        seasons = league_service.get_seasons()\r\n        leagues = league_service.get_leagues()\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Successfully retrieved {len(seasons)} seasons and {len(leagues)} leagues\")",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\nclass DataAdapterPandas(DataAdapter):\r\n    def __init__(self, path_to_csv_data: pathlib.Path=None, df: pd.DataFrame=None, database: str=None):\r\n        self.data_path = path_to_csv_data\r\n        self.df = None\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        \r\n        if path_to_csv_data is not None and path_to_csv_data.exists():\r\n            self._load_data()\r\n        elif df is not None:\r\n            self.df = df\r\n        elif database is not None:\r\n            # Load from database parameter\r\n            self._load_data_from_database()\r\n        else:\r\n            print(type(path_to_csv_data))\r\n            print(type(df))\r\n            print(type(database))\r\n            raise ValueError(\"Either path_to_csv_data, df, or database must be provided\")\r\n    \r\n    def _load_data_from_database(self):\r\n        \"\"\"Load data from database parameter\"\"\"\r\n        if self.database is None:\r\n            raise ValueError(\"Database parameter is required\")\r\n        \r\n        # Construct path to the database file\r\n        database_path = pathlib.Path(\"database\", \"data\", self.database).absolute()\r\n        print(f\"Loading data from database: {self.database} at path: {database_path}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not database_path.exists():\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"Database file not found: {database_path}\")\r\n        \r\n        self.data_path = database_path\r\n        self._load_data()\r\n\r\n    def _load_data(self):\r\n        \"\"\"Load data from CSV file\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Loading data from {self.data_path}\")\r\n        self.df = pd.read_csv(self.data_path, sep=';')\r\n\r\n    def set_dataframe(self, df):\r\n        \"\"\"Set the dataframe directly (for testing or in-memory operations)\"\"\"\r\n        self.df = df",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\nclass DataAdapterPandas(DataAdapter):\r\n    def __init__(self, path_to_csv_data: pathlib.Path=None, df: pd.DataFrame=None, database: str=None):\r\n        self.data_path = path_to_csv_data\r\n        self.df = None\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        \r\n        if path_to_csv_data is not None and path_to_csv_data.exists():\r\n            self._load_data()\r\n        elif df is not None:\r\n            self.df = df\r\n        elif database is not None:\r\n            # Load from database parameter\r\n            self._load_data_from_database()\r\n        else:\r\n            print(type(path_to_csv_data))\r\n            print(type(df))\r\n            print(type(database))\r\n            raise ValueError(\"Either path_to_csv_data, df, or database must be provided\")\r\n    \r\n    def _load_data_from_database(self):\r\n        \"\"\"Load data from database parameter\"\"\"\r\n        if self.database is None:\r\n            raise ValueError(\"Database parameter is required\")\r\n        \r\n        # Construct path to the database file\r\n        database_path = pathlib.Path(\"database\", \"data\", self.database).absolute()\r\n        print(f\"Loading data from database: {self.database} at path: {database_path}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not database_path.exists():\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"Database file not found: {database_path}\")\r\n        \r\n        self.data_path = database_path\r\n        self._load_data()\r\n\r\n    def _load_data(self):\r\n        \"\"\"Load data from CSV file\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Loading data from {self.data_path}\")\r\n        self.df = pd.read_csv(self.data_path, sep=';')\r\n\r\n    def set_dataframe(self, df):\r\n        \"\"\"Set the dataframe directly (for testing or in-memory operations)\"\"\"\r\n        self.df = df",

          "endPosition": {

            "line": 25

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import Union, List, Optional\r\n\r\ndef fetch_data(\r\n    database_df: pd.DataFrame, \r\n    columns_to_fetch: Union[str, List[str], None] = None, \r\n    values_to_filter_for: dict = None,\r\n    group_by: Union[str, List[str], None] = None\r\n\r\n) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Creates a new DataFrame with requested rows and columns\r\n    \r\n    Args:\r\n        database_df: Source DataFrame\r\n        columns: Single column name or list of column names to fetch\r\n        filters: Dictionary of {column: [values]} to filter rows\r\n    \r\n    Returns:\r\n        New DataFrame containing only requested data\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    # Create boolean mask for row filtering\r\n    mask = pd.Series(True, index=database_df.index)\r\n    if values_to_filter_for:\r\n        for filter_col, values in values_to_filter_for.items():\r\n            if values not in [None,[], [None]]:\r\n                values = [values] if not isinstance(values, List) else values\r\n                mask \u0026= database_df[filter_col].isin(values)\r\n    \r\n    database_fetched = 0\r\n\r\n    # Handle column selection\r\n    if columns_to_fetch is not None:\r\n        # Convert single column to list\r\n        selected_columns = [columns_to_fetch] if not isinstance(columns_to_fetch, List) else columns_to_fetch\r\n        # Ensure all filter columns are included if needed for the operation\r\n        if group_by is not None:\r\n            selected_columns = list(set(selected_columns + [group_by]))\r\n        #    filter_cols = list(values_to_filter_for.keys())\r\n        #    selected_columns = list(set(selected_columns + filter_cols))\r\n        \r\n        # Return selected rows and columns\r\n        database_fetched = database_df.loc[mask, selected_columns].copy()\r\n    else:\r\n        # Return all columns for selected rows\r\n        database_fetched = database_df.loc[mask].copy() \r\n    \r\n    if group_by is not None:\r\n        database_fetched = database_fetched.groupby(group_by)\r\n\r\n    return database_fetched",

        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import Union, List, Optional\r\n\r\ndef fetch_data(\r\n    database_df: pd.DataFrame, \r\n    columns_to_fetch: Union[str, List[str], None] = None, \r\n    values_to_filter_for: dict = None,\r\n    group_by: Union[str, List[str], None] = None\r\n\r\n) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Creates a new DataFrame with requested rows and columns\r\n    \r\n    Args:\r\n        database_df: Source DataFrame\r\n        columns: Single column name or list of column names to fetch\r\n        filters: Dictionary of {column: [values]} to filter rows\r\n    \r\n    Returns:\r\n        New DataFrame containing only requested data\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    # Create boolean mask for row filtering\r\n    mask = pd.Series(True, index=database_df.index)\r\n    if values_to_filter_for:\r\n        for filter_col, values in values_to_filter_for.items():\r\n            if values not in [None,[], [None]]:\r\n                values = [values] if not isinstance(values, List) else values\r\n                mask \u0026= database_df[filter_col].isin(values)\r\n    \r\n    database_fetched = 0\r\n\r\n    #     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import pandas as pd\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\nfrom data_access.pd_dataframes import fetch_data, fetch_column\r\n\r\n\r\ndef query_database(database_df: pd.DataFrame, filters: dict = None, column_name: Columns = None, group_by: Columns = None) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n    df_filtered = database_df.copy()  # Start with a copy of the full DataFrame\r\n    \r\n    if filters:\r\n        for key, value in filters.items():\r\n            if value is None or value == [None]:\r\n                continue\r\n            \r\n            if not isinstance(value, list):\r\n                value = [value]\r\n            \r\n            df_filtered = df_filtered[df_filtered[key].isin(value)]\r\n    \r\n    if group_by is not None:\r\n        df_filtered = df_filtered.groupby(group_by)\r\n    \r\n    return df_filtered",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\nfrom data_access.pd_dataframes import fetch_data, fetch_column\r\n\r\n\r\ndef query_database(database_df: pd.DataFrame, filters: dict = None, column_name: Columns = None, group_by: Columns = None) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n    df_filtered = database_df.copy()  # Start with a copy of the full DataFrame\r\n    \r\n    if filters:\r\n        for key, value in filters.items():\r\n            if value is None or value == [None]:\r\n                continue\r\n            \r\n            if not isinstance(value, list):\r\n                value = [value]\r\n            \r\n            df_filtered = df_filtered[df_filtered[key].isin(value)]\r\n    \r\n    if group_by is not None:\r\n        df_filtered = df_filtered.groupby(group_by)\r\n    \r\n    return df_filtered",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\nclass DataAdapterFactory:\r\n    @staticmethod\r\n    def create_adapter(adapter_type: DataAdapterSelector, database: str = None) -\u003e DataAdapter:\r\n        if adapter_type == DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS:\r\n            from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_pandas import DataAdapterPandas\r\n            if database:\r\n                # Use the database parameter directly\r\n                print(f\"DEBUG: DataAdapterFactory using database parameter: {database}\")\r\n                return DataAdapterPandas(database=database)\r\n            else:\r\n                # Fallback to current DataManager logic\r\n                try:\r\n                    from app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\n                    data_manager = DataManager()\r\n                    current_source = data_manager.current_source\r\n                    print(f\"DEBUG: DataAdapterFactory using source: {current_source}\")\r\n                    # Create path to current data source\r\n                    current_path = pathlib.Path(\r\n                        \"database\",\r\n                        \"data\",\r\n                        current_source\r\n                    ).absolute()\r\n                    print(f\"DEBUG: DataAdapterFactory using path: {current_path}\")\r\n                    return DataAdapterPandas(path_to_csv_data=current_path)\r\n                except ImportError:\r\n                    # Fallback to config if DataManager not available\r\n                    print(f\"DEBUG: DataAdapterFactory using fallback config path\")\r\n                    return DataAdapterPandas(path_to_csv_data=path_to_csv_data)\r\n        elif adapter_type == DataAdapterSelector.MYSQL:\r\n            from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_mysql import MySQLAdapter\r\n            return MySQLAdapter()\r\n        elif adapter_type == DataAdapterSelector.SQLITE:\r\n            from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_sqlite import SQLiteAdapter\r\n            return SQLiteAdapter()\r\n        else:\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unknown adapter type: {adapter_type}\")",

          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "class DataAdapter(ABC):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Abstract base class for data adapters\"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\nclass DataAdapterFactory:\r\n    @staticmethod\r\n    def create_adapter(adapter_type: DataAdapterSelector, database: str = None) -\u003e DataAdapter:\r\n        if adapter_type == DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS:\r\n            from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_pandas import DataAdapterPandas\r\n            if database:\r\n                # Use the database parameter directly\r\n                print(f\"DEBUG: DataAdapterFactory using database parameter: {database}\")\r\n                return DataAdapterPandas(database=database)\r\n            else:\r\n                # Fallback to current DataManager logic\r\n                try:\r\n                    from app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\n                    data_manager = DataManager()\r\n                    current_source = data_manager.current_source\r\n                    print(f\"DEBUG: DataAdapterFactory using source: {current_source}\")\r\n                    # Create path to current data source\r\n                    current_path = pathlib.Path(\r\n                        \"database\",\r\n                        \"data\",\r\n                        current_source\r\n                    ).absolute()\r\n                    print(f\"DEBUG: DataAdapterFactory using path: {current_path}\")\r\n                    return DataAdapterPandas(path_to_csv_data=current_path)\r\n                except ImportError:\r\n                    # Fallback to config if DataManager not available\r\n                    print(f\"DEBUG: DataAdapterFactory using fallback config path\")\r\n                    return DataAdapterPandas(path_to_csv_data=path_to_csv_data)\r\n        elif adapter_type == DataAdapterSelector.MYSQL:\r\n            from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_mysql import MySQLAdapter\r\n            return MySQLAdapter()\r\n        elif adapter_type == DataAdapterSelector.SQLITE:\r\n            from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_sqlite import SQLiteAdapter\r\n            return SQLiteAdapter()\r\n        else:\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unknown adapter type: {adapter_type}\")",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 71

            "line": 8
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\ndef filter_data(\r\n    database_df: pd.DataFrame, \r\n    columns: Union[str, List[str], None] = None, \r\n    filters: dict = None,\r\n) -\u003e None:\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Modifies DataFrame in place using filters and column selection\r\n    \r\n    Args:\r\n        database_df: DataFrame to modify\r\n        columns: Single column name or list of column names to keep\r\n        filters: Dictionary of {column: [values]} to filter rows\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    # Apply row filters first\r\n    if filters:\r\n        for filter_col, values in filters.items():\r\n            if values is not None:\r\n                database_df.query(f\"{filter_col} in @values\", inplace=True)\r\n    \r\n    # Then select columns if specified\r\n    if columns is not None:\r\n        # Convert single column to list\r\n        selected_columns = [columns] if isinstance(columns, str) else columns\r\n        # Drop columns not in the selection\r\n        to_drop = [col for col in database_df.columns if col not in selected_columns]\r\n        database_df.drop(columns=to_drop, inplace=True)",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\ndef filter_data(\r\n    database_df: pd.DataFrame, \r\n    columns: Union[str, List[str], None] = None, \r\n    filters: dict = None,\r\n) -\u003e None:\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Modifies DataFrame in place using filters and column selection\r\n    \r\n    Args:\r\n        database_df: DataFrame to modify\r\n        columns: Single column name or list of column names to keep\r\n        filters: Dictionary of {column: [values]} to filter rows\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    # Apply row filters first\r\n    if filters:\r\n        for filter_col, values in filters.items():\r\n            if values is not None:\r\n                database_df.query(f\"{filter_col} in @values\", inplace=True)\r\n    \r\n    # Then select columns if specified\r\n    if columns is not None:\r\n        # Convert single column to list\r\n        selected_columns = [columns] if isinstance(columns, str) else columns\r\n        # Drop columns not in the selection\r\n        to_drop = [col for col in database_df.columns if col not in selected_columns]\r\n        database_df.drop(columns=to_drop, inplace=True)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import pandas as pd\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector   \r\nfrom typing import List\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\n\r\nclass Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\r\n    _instance = None\r\n    \r\n    def __new__(cls, database: str = None):\r\n        if cls._instance is None:\r\n            cls._instance = super(Server, cls).__new__(cls)\r\n            cls._instance._initialized = False\r\n        return cls._instance\r\n    \r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        # Always update the database parameter and refresh if it changed\r\n        if not self._initialized or self._database != database:\r\n            self._database = database\r\n            self.data_adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=database)\r\n            # Register this server instance with DataManager for automatic refresh\r\n            try:\r\n                from app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\n                data_manager = DataManager()\r\n                data_manager.register_server_instance(self)\r\n            except ImportError:\r\n                # DataManager not available, continue without registration\r\n                pass\r\n            self._initialized = True\r\n\r\n    def refresh_data_adapter(self, database: str = None):\r\n        \"\"\"Refresh the data adapter with the current data source\"\"\"\r\n        if database:\r\n            self._database = database\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Server refreshing data adapter with database: {self._database}\")\r\n        self.data_adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=self._database)\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Server data adapter refreshed\")\r\n\r\n    def get_player_data(self, player_name: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        return self.data_adapter.get_player_data(player_name)",

        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector   \r\nfrom typing import List\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\n\r\nclass Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\r\n    _instance = None\r\n    \r\n    def __new__(cls, database: str = None):\r\n        if cls._instance is None:\r\n            cls._instance = super(Server, cls).__new__(cls)\r\n            cls._instance._initialized = False\r\n        return cls._instance\r\n    \r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        # Always update the database parameter and refresh if it changed\r\n        if not self._initialized or self._database != database:\r\n            self._database = database\r\n            self.data_adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=database)\r\n            # Register this server instance with DataManager for automatic refresh\r\n            try:\r\n                from app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\n                data_manager = DataManager()\r\n                data_manager.register_server_instance(self)\r\n            except ImportError:\r\n                # DataManager not available, continue without registration\r\n                pass\r\n            self._initialized = True\r\n\r\n    def refresh_data_adapter(self, database: str = None):\r\n        \"\"\"Refresh the data adapter with the current data source\"\"\"\r\n        if database:\r\n            self._database = database\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Server refreshing data adapter with database: {self._database}\")\r\n        self.data_adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=self._database)\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Server data adapter refreshed\")\r\n\r\n    def get_player_data(self, player_name: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        return self.data_adapter.get_player_data(player_name)",
