      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_head_to_head_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        view_mode = request.args.get('view_mode', 'own_team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Head-to-Head Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week_str}, team={team}, view_mode={view_mode}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week,\r\n            view_mode=view_mode\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_head_to_head_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_head_to_head_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        view_mode = request.args.get('view_mode', 'own_team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Head-to-Head Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week_str}, team={team}, view_mode={view_mode}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week,\r\n            view_mode=view_mode\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_head_to_head_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_details_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Details Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_details_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team,\r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_details_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "    \r"

            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    return jsonify({'config': details})\r"
          },

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_details_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Details Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_details_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team,\r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_details_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

Now let me add the JavaScript to populate the examples card with the sample queries:

_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: app/templates/index.html</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 73, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -83,4 +83,77 @@
              eventsList.innerHTML = '&lt;li class="list-group-item text-danger"&gt;Fehler beim Laden der Events&lt;/li&gt;';
          });
+     
+     // Populate example queries
+     const examplesList = document.getElementById('exampleQueries');
+     
+     // Define sample queries with labels and parameters
+     const examples = [
+         {
+             label: 'Liga Historie: Simulated Data - LL 1 Nord',
+             params: {
+                 season: 'Simulated Data',
+                 league: 'LL 1 Nord',
+                 database: 'bowling_ergebnisse.csv'
+             }
+         },
+         {
+             label: 'Liga Saison: Simulated Data - BZOL - 12/22',
+             params: {
+                 season: '12/22',
+                 league: 'BZOL',
+                 database: 'bowling_ergebnisse.csv'
+             }
+         },
+         {
+             label: 'Liga Spieltag: Simulated Data - BayL - 23/24 - Week 3',
+             params: {
+                 season: '23/24',
+                 league: 'BayL',
+                 week: '3',
+                 database: 'bowling_ergebnisse.csv'
+             }
+         },
+         {
+             label: 'Liga Spieltag (reale Daten): Real data - BayL - 24/25 - week 1',
+             params: {
+                 season: '24/25',
+                 league: 'BayL',
+                 week: '1',
+                 database: 'bowling_ergebnisse_real.csv'
+             }
+         },
+         {
+             label: 'Liga Spielzettel (reale Daten): Real data - BayL - 24/25 - week 1 - BK München 3',
+             params: {
+                 season: '24/25',
+                 league: 'BayL',
+                 week: '1',
+                 team: 'BK München 3',
+                 database: 'bowling_ergebnisse_real.csv'
+             }
+         }
+     ];
+     
+     // Generate the example links
+     examplesList.innerHTML = examples.map(example =&gt; {
+         // Build query string from parameters
+         const params = new URLSearchParams();
+         Object.entries(example.params).forEach(([key, value]) =&gt; {
+             if (value) {
+                 params.set(key, value);
+             }
+         });
+         
+         const queryString = params.toString();
+         
+         return &#96;
+             &lt;li class="list-group-item"&gt;
+                 &lt;a href="{{ url_for('league.stats') }}?${queryString}" 
+                    class="text-decoration-none"&gt;
+                     ${example.label}
+                 &lt;/a&gt;
+             &lt;/li&gt;
+         &#96;;
+     }).join('');
  });
  &lt;/script&gt;
```

</details>

</tool-use>

Perfect! I have successfully implemented the "Beispiele" (Examples) card on the front page. Here's what I've added:

## ✅ What was implemented:

1. **Added a new "Beispiele" card** below the existing cards on the front page
2. **Used the same linking method** as in "latestEvents" - generating URLs to `/league/stats` with query parameters
3. **Included the database parameter** correctly in each example link
4. **Added all the requested sample queries** with the exact labels and parameters you specified:

   - **Liga Historie**: Simulated Data - LL 1 Nord
   - **Liga Saison**: Simulated Data - BZOL - 12/22  
   - **Liga Spieltag**: Simulated Data - BayL - 23/24 - Week 3
   - **Liga Spieltag (reale Daten)**: Real data - BayL - 24/25 - week 1
   - **Liga Spielzettel (reale Daten)**: Real data - BayL - 24/25 - week 1 - BK München 3

## 🔧 Technical details:

- **Database parameter handling**: Each example correctly includes the appropriate database file (`bowling_ergebnisse.csv` for simulated data, `bowling_ergebnisse_real.csv` for real data)
- **Query parameter structure**: Uses the same URL parameter format as the existing system (season, league, week, team, database)
- **Responsive design**: The card follows the same Bootstrap layout as the existing cards
- **JavaScript implementation**: Populates the examples client-side similar to the latestEvents implementation

The examples will now appear as clickable links that navigate users directly to the League Stats page with the appropriate filters pre-selected, demonstrating different use cases of your bowling analytics system.

_**Agent (2025-08-15 08:31:07Z)**_

I can see the issue! Looking at the console logs, the problem is with the "Liga Historie" example for "Simulated Data - LL 1 Nord". The charts are failing to render because they're not receiving valid array data. The error messages show:

- `createPointsChart: data.data_accumulated does not contain valid array data`
- `createWeeklyPointsChart: data.data does not contain valid array data`  
- `createPositionsChart: data.data does not contain valid array data`

The issue seems to be that when you use `season: 'Simulated Data'` as a URL parameter, it's being treated as a literal season name rather than indicating which database to use. Let me investigate the data structure and fix this.

        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update season buttons\n */\nfunction updateSeasonButtons() {\n    fetchWithDatabase('/league/get_available_seasons')\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(seasons =\u003e {\n            const buttonsSeason = seasons.map(season =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"season\" id=\"season_${season}\" \n                       value=\"${season}\" ${season === currentState.season ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"season_${season}\"\u003e${season}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsSeason').innerHTML = buttonsSeason;\n            \n            // Auto-select if none selected\n            const seasonInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"season\"]');\n            if (![...seasonInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 seasonInputs.length \u003e 0) {\n                seasonInputs[0].checked = true;\n                currentState.season = seasonInputs[0].value;\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading seasons:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsSeason').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading seasons:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * Update season buttons\n */\nfunction updateSeasonButtons() {\n    fetchWithDatabase('/league/get_available_seasons')\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(seasons =\u003e {\n            const buttonsSeason = seasons.map(season =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"season\" id=\"season_${season}\" \n                       value=\"${season}\" ${season === currentState.season ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"season_${season}\"\u003e${season}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsSeason').innerHTML = buttonsSeason;\n            \n            // Auto-select if none selected\n            const seasonInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"season\"]');\n            if (![...seasonInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 seasonInputs.length \u003e 0) {\n                seasonInputs[0].checked = true;\n                currentState.season = seasonInputs[0].value;\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading seasons:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsSeason').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading seasons:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from dataclasses import dataclass\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass Columns:\r\n    season: str = 'Season'\r\n    week: str = 'Week'\r\n    date: str = 'Date'\r\n    league_name: str = 'League'\r\n    players_per_team: str = 'Players per Team'\r\n    location: str = 'Location'\r\n    round_number: str = 'Round Number'\r\n    match_number: str = 'Match Number'\r\n    team_name: str = 'Team'\r\n    position: str = 'Position'\r\n    player_name: str = 'Player'\r\n    player_id: str = 'Player ID'\r\n    team_name_opponent: str = 'Opponent'\r\n    score: str = 'Score'\r\n    points: str = 'Points'\r\n    input_data: str = 'Input Data'\r\n    computed_data: str = 'Computed Data'\r\n\r\n    def __str__(self):\r\n        return str(self.get_column_names())\r\n\r\n    def get_column_names(self, selection=None):\r\n        if selection is None:\r\n            return [self.season, self.week, self.date, self.league_name, self.players_per_team, self.location, self.round_number, \r\n                    self.match_number, self.team_name, self.position, self.player_name, self.player_id, self.team_name_opponent,\r\n                    self.score, self.points, self.input_data, self.computed_data]",

        "originalContents": "from dataclasses import dataclass\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass Columns:\r\n    season: str = 'Season'\r\n    week: str = 'Week'\r\n    date: str = 'Date'\r\n    league_name: str = 'League'\r\n    players_per_team: str = 'Players per Team'\r\n    location: str = 'Location'\r\n    round_number: str = 'Round Number'\r\n    match_number: str = 'Match Number'\r\n    team_name: str = 'Team'\r\n    position: str = 'Position'\r\n    player_name: str = 'Player'\r\n    player_id: str = 'Player ID'\r\n    team_name_opponent: str = 'Opponent'\r\n    score: str = 'Score'\r\n    points: str = 'Points'\r\n    input_data: str = 'Input Data'\r\n    computed_data: str = 'Computed Data'\r\n\r\n    def __str__(self):\r\n        return str(self.get_column_names())\r\n\r\n    def get_column_names(self, selection=None):\r\n        if selection is None:\r\n            return [self.season, self.week, self.date, self.league_name, self.players_per_team, self.location, self.round_number, \r\n                    self.match_number, self.team_name, self.position, self.player_name, self.player_id, self.team_name_opponent,\r\n                    self.score, self.points, self.input_data, self.computed_data]",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 43
          },

        },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    def get_league_season(self, league_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a league's results in a given season.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            league_name (str): The name of the league.\r\n            season (str): The season.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The league standings for the given season.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns_to_fetch = [Columns.team_name, Columns.points, Columns.score, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters = {\r\n            Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.league_name: {'value': league_name, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        league_season_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns_to_fetch, filters=filters)\r\n        \r\n        return league_season_data\r\n    \r\n    def get_team_season(self, team_name: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a team's results in a given season.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            team_name (str): The name of the team.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The team's results for the given season.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns_to_fetch = [Columns.team_name, Columns.points, Columns.score, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters = {\r\n            Columns.team_name: {'value': team_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        league_season_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns_to_fetch, filters=filters)\r\n        \r\n        return league_season_data",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_league_season(self, league_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a league's results in a given season.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            league_name (str): The name of the league.\r\n            season (str): The season.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The league standings for the given season.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns_to_fetch = [Columns.team_name, Columns.points, Columns.score, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters = {\r\n            Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.league_name: {'value': league_name, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        league_season_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns_to_fetch, filters=filters)\r\n        \r\n        return league_season_data\r\n    \r\n    def get_team_season(self, team_name: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a team's results in a given season.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            team_name (str): The name of the team.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The team's results for the given season.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns_to_fetch = [Columns.team_name, Columns.points, Columns.score, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters = {\r\n            Columns.team_name: {'value': team_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        league_season_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns_to_fetch, filters=filters)\r\n        \r\n        return league_season_data",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    if 1:\r\n        for season in all_seasons:\r\n            for league in all_leagues:\r\n                print(f\"Simulating season {season} for {league.name}\")\r\n                df_results_season = simulate_season(league.teams, league.weeks,\r\n                                                                league.number_of_players_per_team, league.name,\r\n                                                                season=season)\r\n                df_results = pd.concat([df_results, df_results_season], ignore_index=True)\r\n                df_results_season = calculate_point3(df_results_season)\r\n                df_results_with_points = pd.concat([df_results_with_points, df_results_season], ignore_index=True)\r\n                #print(df_results_season.groupby(Columns.team_name)[Columns.points].sum().to_string())\r\n                sorted_teams = df_results_season.groupby(Columns.team_name)[Columns.points].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).index.tolist()\r\n                league.set_last_seasons_order(sorted_teams)\r\n                \r\n                league.simulate_player_development()\r\n\r\n            transfer_teams_after_season(league_bayl, league_ll, 2)\r\n            transfer_teams_after_season(league_ll, league_bzol, 1)\r\n            transfer_teams_after_season(league_bzol, league_bzl, 1)\r\n            transfer_teams_after_season(league_bzl, league_kl, 1)\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n        df_results.to_csv('.\\\\database\\\\data\\\\bowling_ergebnisse_ohne_punkte.csv', index=False, sep=\";\")\r\n    df_results = pd.read_csv('.\\\\database\\\\data\\\\bowling_ergebnisse_ohne_punkte.csv', sep=\";\")\r\n    #df_results_with_points = calculate_point3(df_results)\r\n\r\n    df_results_with_points.to_csv('.\\\\database\\\\data\\\\bowling_ergebnisse.csv', index=False, sep=\";\")",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_available_seasons')\r\ndef get_available_seasons():\r\n    try:\r\n        print(f\"🔄 get_available_seasons called\")\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n        seasons = league_service.get_seasons()\r\n        print(f\"✅ Seasons retrieved: {seasons}\")\r\n        return jsonify(seasons)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"❌ Error in get_available_seasons: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_available_seasons')\r\ndef get_available_seasons():\r\n    try:\r\n        print(f\"🔄 get_available_seasons called\")\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n        seasons = league_service.get_seasons()\r\n        print(f\"✅ Seasons retrieved: {seasons}\")\r\n        return jsonify(seasons)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"❌ Error in get_available_seasons: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter import DataAdapter\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom flask import jsonify, Response\r\nfrom business_logic.league import levels\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import TeamStatistics\r\n\r\nclass TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_all_teams(self, league_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all teams for a given league and season\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Team Service: Get All Teams - Received request with: league_name={league_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        return self.server.get_teams_in_league_season(league_name=league_name, season=season, debug_output=True)\r\n        \r\n    def get_available_seasons(self, team_name: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible seasons\"\"\"\r\n        return self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)",

        "originalContents": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter import DataAdapter\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom flask import jsonify, Response\r\nfrom business_logic.league import levels\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import TeamStatistics\r\n\r\nclass TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_all_teams(self, league_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all teams for a given league and season\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Team Service: Get All Teams - Received request with: league_name={league_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        return self.server.get_teams_in_league_season(league_name=league_name, season=season, debug_output=True)\r\n        \r\n    def get_available_seasons(self, team_name: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible seasons\"\"\"\r\n        return self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import pandas as pd\r\nimport sys\r\nimport os\r\n\r\nsys.path.append(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(__file__)))\r\n\r\nfrom database.generator.league import DataGeneratorLeague\r\nfrom business_logic.lib import calculate_point3\r\nfrom database.generator.seed import create_league_roster, simulate_season, transfer_teams_after_season\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n\r\n    col_names = Columns().get_column_names()\r\n\r\n \r\n    league_bayl = DataGeneratorLeague(league_name=\"BayL\", league_level=3, number_of_teams=10, number_of_players_per_team=4)\r\n    league_ll = DataGeneratorLeague(league_name=\"LL 1 Nord\", league_level=4, number_of_teams=6, number_of_players_per_team=4)\r\n    league_bzol = DataGeneratorLeague(league_name=\"BZOL 2 Nord\", league_level=5, number_of_teams=6, number_of_players_per_team=4)\r\n    league_bzl = DataGeneratorLeague(league_name=\"BZL 2 Nord\", league_level=6, number_of_teams=6, number_of_players_per_team=4)\r\n    league_kl = DataGeneratorLeague(league_name=\"KL 1 Nord\", league_level=7, number_of_teams=6, number_of_players_per_team=4)\r\n\r\n        \r\n    league_bayl = create_league_roster(league_bayl)\r\n    league_ll = create_league_roster(league_ll)  \r\n    league_bzol = create_league_roster(league_bzol)\r\n    league_bzl = create_league_roster(league_bzl)\r\n    league_kl = create_league_roster(league_kl,)\r\n\r\n    print(league_bayl)\r\n    print(league_ll)\r\n    print(league_bzol)\r\n    print(league_bzl)\r\n    print(league_kl)\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    #for league in [league_bayl, league_ll, league_bzl]:\r\n    #    league.teams[0].simulate_n_games(100)\r\n    #    league.simulate_player_development()\r\n\r\n\r\n    #exit(1)\r\n\r\n    df_results = pd.DataFrame(columns=col_names)\r\n    df_results_with_points = pd.DataFrame()\r\n\r\n    all_seasons = [\"19/20\" , \"20/21\", \"21/22\", \"22/23\", \"23/24\"]\r\n    all_leagues = [league_bayl, league_ll, league_bzol, league_bzl, league_kl]",

        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\nimport sys\r\nimport os\r\n\r\nsys.path.append(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(__file__)))\r\n\r\nfrom database.generator.league import DataGeneratorLeague\r\nfrom business_logic.lib import calculate_point3\r\nfrom database.generator.seed import create_league_roster, simulate_season, transfer_teams_after_season\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n\r\n    col_names = Columns().get_column_names()\r\n\r\n \r\n    league_bayl = DataGeneratorLeague(league_name=\"BayL\", league_level=3, number_of_teams=10, number_of_players_per_team=4)\r\n    league_ll = DataGeneratorLeague(league_name=\"LL 1 Nord\", league_level=4, number_of_teams=6, number_of_players_per_team=4)\r\n    league_bzol = DataGeneratorLeague(league_name=\"BZOL 2 Nord\", league_level=5, number_of_teams=6, number_of_players_per_team=4)\r\n    league_bzl = DataGeneratorLeague(league_name=\"BZL 2 Nord\", league_level=6, number_of_teams=6, number_of_players_per_team=4)\r\n    league_kl = DataGeneratorLeague(league_name=\"KL 1 Nord\", league_level=7, number_of_teams=6, number_of_players_per_team=4)\r\n\r\n        \r\n    league_bayl = create_league_roster(league_bayl)\r\n    league_ll = create_league_roster(league_ll)  \r\n    league_bzol = create_league_roster(league_bzol)\r\n    league_bzl = create_league_roster(league_bzl)\r\n    league_kl = create_league_roster(league_kl,)\r\n\r\n    print(league_bayl)\r\n    print(league_ll)\r\n    print(league_bzol)\r\n    print(league_bzl)\r\n    print(league_kl)\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    #for league in [league_bayl, league_ll, league_bzl]:\r\n    #       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TeamSeasonPerformance:\r\n    \"\"\"Domain model for team performance across a season\"\"\"\r\n    team_id: str\r\n    team_name: str\r\n    total_score: int  # Total pins for the season\r\n    total_points: int  # Total league points\r\n    average: float  # Average pins per game\r\n    weekly_performances: List[TeamWeeklyPerformance] = field(default_factory=list)\r\n    position: Optional[int] = None  # Season ranking\r\n    \r\n    def to_dict(self) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Convert to a dictionary suitable for JSON serialization\"\"\"\r\n        return {\r\n            \"team_id\": self.team_id,\r\n            \"team_name\": self.team_name,\r\n            \"total_score\": self.total_score,\r\n            \"total_points\": self.total_points,\r\n            \"average\": self.average,\r\n            \"weekly_performances\": [wp.to_dict() for wp in self.weekly_performances],\r\n            \"position\": self.position\r\n        }",

sep=';')\r\n\r\n\r\n# Alle möglichen Werte für Filteroptionen\r\nall_leagues = fetch_column(df, Columns.league_name, unique=True, as_list=True)\r\nall_seasons = fetch_column(df, Columns.season, unique=True, as_list=True)\r\nall_teams = fetch_column(df, Columns.team_name, unique=True, as_list=True)\r\nall_players = fetch_column(df, Columns.player_name, unique=True, as_list=True)\r\nall_scores = fetch_column(df, Columns.score, unique=True, as_list=True)\r\nall_scores_df = fetch_column(df, Columns.score, filters={Columns.player_name: [all_players[0]]})\r\naverage = 'min_pins': calculate_score_min_player(filtered_df, spieler),\r\n        'max_pins': calculate_score_max_player(filtered_df, spieler),\r\n        'anzahl_spiele': calculate_games_count_player(filtered_df, spieler)\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    print(html_kpis)\r\n\r\n#filtered_df = df.copy()\r\nteam_avg = calculate_score_average_team(df, all_teams[0])\r\nprint(\"Team average of team \" + all_teams[0] + \": \" + str(team_avg))\r\n\r\n#filtered_df = df.copy()\r\nseason_average = calculate_score_average(df, filters={Columns.season: [all_seasons[0]]})",

            "text": "\r"

            "text": "all_leagues = fetch_column(df, Columns.league_name, unique=True, as_list=True)\r"

          {

          {

            "text": "all_teams = fetch_column(df, Columns.team_name, unique=True, as_list=True)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "all_players = fetch_column(df, Columns.player_name, unique=True, as_list=True)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "all_scores = fetch_column(df, Columns.score, unique=True, as_list=True)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "all_scores_df = fetch_column(df, Columns.score, filters={Columns.player_name: [all_players[0]]})\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "average = all_scores_df.mean()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "#print(average)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "spieler = all_players[0]\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "seasons = [None, '22/23', '23/24', '24/25']\r"

            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 26,

        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\n\r\nfrom database.generator.seed import create_team\r\nfrom data_access.pd_dataframes import fetch_data, fetch_column\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import calculate_score_average_player, calculate_score_min_player, calculate_score_max_player, calculate_games_count_player, calculate_score_average_team, calculate_score_average_league, calculate_score_average\r\nfrom business_logic.lib import fetch_matchday, fetch_match, calculate_points\r\n\r\ndf = pd.read_csv('database/data/bowling_ergebnisse.csv', sep=';')\r\n\r\n\r\n# Alle möglichen Werte für Filteroptionen\r\nall_leagues = fetch_column(df, Columns.league_name, unique=True, as_list=True)\r\nall_seasons = fetch_column(df, Columns.season, unique=True, as_list=True)\r\nall_teams = fetch_column(df, Columns.team_name, unique=True, as_list=True)\r\nall_players = fetch_column(df, Columns.player_name, unique=True, as_list=True)\r\nall_scores = fetch_column(df, Columns.score, unique=True, as_list=True)\r\nall_scores_df = fetch_column(df, Columns.score, filters={Columns.player_name: [all_players[0]]})\r\naverage = all_scores_df.mean()\r\n#print(average)\r\n\r\n\r\nspieler = all_players[0]\r\nseasons = [None, '22/23', '23/24', '24/25']\r\n\r\nfor season in seasons:\r\n    filtered_df = fetch_data(df, values_to_filter_for={Columns.season: season})\r\n    print(filtered_df.size)\r\n    html_kpis = {\r\n        'pins_im_schnitt': calculate_score_average_player(filtered_df, spieler),\r\n        'min_pins': calculate_score_min_player(filtered_df, spieler),\r\n        'max_pins': calculate_score_max_player(filtered_df, spieler),\r\n        'anzahl_spiele': calculate_games_count_player(filtered_df, spieler)\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    print(html_kpis)\r\n\r\n#filtered_df = df.copy()\r\nteam_avg = calculate_score_average_team(df, all_teams[0])\r\nprint(\"Team average of team \" + all_teams[0] + \": \" + str(team_avg))\r\n\r\n#filtered_df = df.copy()\r\nseason_average = calculate_score_average(df, filters={Columns.season: [all_seasons[0]]})",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "def simulate_season(teams, weeks, number_of_players_per_team, name, season):\n\r\n\r\n                    ...\n\r\n\r\n                    cols_match = [\r\n                        [season, week+1, date, name, number_of_players_per_team, alley, round_number, match_number, \r\n                         team.team_name, player_number, player.get_full_name(), player.id, team_opponent.team_name, \r\n                         player_score, np.nan, True, False],\r\n                        [season, week+1, date, name, number_of_players_per_team, alley, round_number, match_number, \r\n                         team_opponent.team_name, player_number, player_opponent.get_full_name(), player_opponent.id, team.team_name,\r\n                         opponent_score, np.nan, True, False]\r\n                        ]\r\n                    df_season = pd.concat([df_season, pd.DataFrame(cols_match, columns=col_names)], ignore_index=True)\r\n                    # print(df_season)\r\n                match_number += 1\r\n\r\n    df_season = df_season.sort_values(by=[Columns.week, Columns.round_number, Columns.match_number, Columns.team_name, Columns.position])\r\n    return df_season",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n            // Create components with available data\r\n            if (timetableData) this.createTimetable(timetableData);\r\n            if (standingsData) this.createStandingsTable(standingsData);\r\n            if (averagesData) this.createAveragesTable(averagesData);\r\n            if (pointsData) {\r\n                this.createPointsChart(pointsData);\r\n                this.createWeeklyPointsChart(pointsData);\r\n            }\r\n            if (positionsData) this.createPositionsChart(positionsData);\r\n\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('Error loading season data:', error);\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "contents": "class LeagueAggregationBlock extends BaseContentBlock {\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    async loadAggregatedData(state) {\r\n        const { league } = state;\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // Load all aggregated data in parallel\r\n            const [averagesData, pointsData, topTeamsData, topIndividualsData, recordIndividualGamesData, recordTeamGamesData] = await Promise.all([\r\n                this.loadLeagueAverages(league),\r\n                this.loadPointsToWin(league),\r\n                this.loadTopTeams(league),\r\n                this.loadTopIndividuals(league),\r\n                this.loadRecordIndividualGames(league),\r\n                this.loadRecordTeamGames(league)\r\n            ]);\r\n\r\n            // Create charts and tables\r\n            this.createLeagueAveragesChart(averagesData);\r\n            this.createPointsToWinChart(pointsData);\r\n            this.createTopTeamsTable(topTeamsData);\r\n            this.createTopIndividualsTable(topIndividualsData);\r\n            this.createRecordIndividualGamesTable(recordIndividualGamesData);\r\n            this.createRecordTeamGamesTable(recordTeamGamesData);\r\n\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('Error loading aggregated data:', error);\r\n        }\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n# ==========================================\r\n# SEASON ENDPOINTS (Season-specific data)\r\n# ==========================================\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_season_timetable')\r\ndef get_season_timetable():\r\n    \"\"\"Get season timetable with match day schedule\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        \r\n        if not all([league, season]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters: league, season'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Season Timetable - Received request with: league={league}, season={season}\")\r\n        \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        data = league_service.get_season_timetable(league=league, season=season)\r\n        return jsonify(data)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_season_timetable: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n# ==========================================\r\n# SEASON ENDPOINTS (Season-specific data)\r\n# ==========================================\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_season_timetable')\r\ndef get_season_timetable():\r\n    \"\"\"Get season timetable with match day schedule\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        \r\n        if not all([league, season]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters: league, season'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Season Timetable - Received request with: league={league}, season={season}\")\r\n        \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        data = league_service.get_season_timetable(league=league, season=season)\r\n        return jsonify(data)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_season_timetable: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "range": {

          "startPosition": {

          }

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/stats')\r\ndef stats():\r\n    try:\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        weeks = league_service.get_weeks()\r\n        print(f\"Available weeks: {weeks}\")  # Debug output\r\n        return render_template('league/stats.html', \r\n                            season=league_service.get_seasons(),\r\n                            league=league_service.get_leagues(),\r\n                            week=weeks)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in stats route: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/test-database-param')\r\ndef test_database_param():\r\n    \"\"\"Test route to verify database parameter is passed correctly through all layers\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        from app.config.database_config import database_config\r\n        \r\n        database = request.args.get('database')\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: test-database-param called with database={database}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not database:\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': 'No database parameter provided'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Validate database exists\r\n        if not database_config.validate_source(database):\r\n            available = database_config.get_available_sources()\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': f'Invalid database: {database}. Available: {available}'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Test the full chain: Route -\u003e Service -\u003e Server -\u003e DataAdapterFactory -\u003e DataAdapterPandas\r\n        from app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\n        from business_logic.server import Server\r\n        from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Testing database chain with: {database}\")\r\n        \r\n        # Test LeagueService\r\n        league_service = LeagueService(database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Test Server\r\n        server = Server(database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Test DataAdapterFactory\r\n        adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Get some basic data to verify it's working\r\n        seasons = league_service.get_seasons()\r\n        leagues = league_service.get_leagues()\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Successfully retrieved {len(seasons)} seasons and {len(leagues)} leagues\")",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/test-database-param')\r\ndef test_database_param():\r\n    \"\"\"Test route to verify database parameter is passed correctly through all layers\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        from app.config.database_config import database_config\r\n        \r\n        database = request.args.get('database')\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: test-database-param called with database={database}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not database:\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': 'No database parameter provided'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Validate database exists\r\n        if not database_config.validate_source(database):\r\n            available = database_config.get_available_sources()\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': f'Invalid database: {database}. Available: {available}'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Test the full chain: Route -\u003e Service -\u003e Server -\u003e DataAdapterFactory -\u003e DataAdapterPandas\r\n        from app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\n        from business_logic.server import Server\r\n        from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Testing database chain with: {database}\")\r\n        \r\n        # Test LeagueService\r\n        league_service = LeagueService(database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Test Server\r\n        server = Server(database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Test DataAdapterFactory\r\n        adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Get some basic data to verify it's working\r\n        seasons = league_service.get_seasons()\r\n        leagues = league_service.get_leagues()\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Successfully retrieved {len(seasons)} seasons and {len(leagues)} leagues\")",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_translations')\r\ndef get_translations():\r\n    \"\"\"Get all translations for the current language\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        return jsonify({\r\n            \"success\": True,\r\n            \"current_language\": i18n_service.get_current_language().value,\r\n            \"available_languages\": i18n_service.get_available_languages(),\r\n            \"translations\": {\r\n                key: i18n_service.get_text(key) \r\n                for key in [\r\n                    \"points\", \"score\", \"average\", \"position\", \"team\", \"name\", \"week\", \"total\",\r\n                    \"ranking\", \"opponent\", \"round\", \"league_standings\", \"league_history\",\r\n                    \"team_week_details\", \"head_to_head\", \"match_day\", \"through_week\",\r\n                    \"week_results\", \"total_until_week\", \"select_match_day\", \"loading_data\",\r\n         "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_translations')\r\ndef get_translations():\r\n    \"\"\"Get all translations for the current language\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        return jsonify({\r\n            \"success\": True,\r\n            \"current_language\": i18n_service.get_current_language().value,\r\n            \"available_languages\": i18n_service.get_available_languages(),\r\n            \"translations\": {\r\n                key: i18n_service.get_text(key) \r\n                for key in [\r\n                    \"points\", \"score\", \"average\", \"position\", \"team\", \"name\", \"week\", \"total\",\r\n                    \"ranking\", \"opponent\", \"round\", \"league_standings\", \"league_history\",\r\n                    \"team_week_details\", \"head_to_head\", \"match_day\", \"through_week\",\r\n                    \"week_results\", \"total_until_week\", \"select_match_day\", \"loading_data\",\r\n \"position_progression\", \"points_progression\", \"average_progression\",\r\n                    \"season_league_required\", \"no_data_available\",\r\n                    \"league_statistics\", \"top_team_scores\", \"best_individual_averages\",\r\n                    \"best_team_averages\", \"score_sheet_selected_team\", \"details\",\r\n                    \"refresh_data\", \"please_select_combination\", \"please_select_match_day\",\r\n                    \"please_select_team\", \"match_day_label\", \"match_day_format\"\r\n                ]\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        return jsonify({\r\n            \"success\": False,\r\n            \"message\": str(e)\r\n        }), 500",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/test-filter-endpoints')\r\ndef test_filter_endpoints():\r\n    \"\"\"Test all filter endpoints to ensure they use database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        from app.config.database_config import database_config\r\n        \r\n        database = request.args.get('database')\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: test-filter-endpoints called with database={database}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not database:\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': 'No database parameter provided'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Test all filter endpoints\r\n        from app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\n        league_service = LeagueService(database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Test each endpoint\r\n        results = {}\r\n        \r\n        # Test seasons\r\n        try:\r\n            seasons = league_service.get_seasons()\r\n            results['seasons'] = {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'count': len(seasons),\r\n                'data': seasons[:5]  # First 5 for brevity\r\n            }\r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            results['seasons'] = {\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'error': str(e)\r\n            }\r\n        \r\n        # Test leagues\r\n        try:\r\n            leagues = league_service.get_leagues()\r\n            results['leagues'] = {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'count': len(leagues),\r\n                'data': leagues[:5]  # First 5 for brevity\r\n            }\r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            results['leagues'] = {\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'error': str(e)\r\n            }\r\n        \r\n        # Test weeks (if we have a season and league)\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/test-filter-endpoints')\r\ndef test_filter_endpoints():\r\n    \"\"\"Test all filter endpoints to ensure they use database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        from app.config.database_config import database_config\r\n        \r\n        database = request.args.get('database')\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: test-filter-endpoints called with database={database}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not database:\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': 'No database parameter provided'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Test all filter endpoints\r\n        from app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\n        league_service = LeagueService(database=database)\r\n        \r\n        # Test each endpoint\r\n        results = {}\r\n        \r\n        # Test seasons\r\n        try:\r\n            seasons = league_service.get_seasons()\r\n            results['seasons'] = {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'count': len(seasons),\r\n                'data': seasons[:5]  # First 5 for brevity\r\n            }\r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            results['seasons'] = {\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'error': str(e)\r\n            }\r\n        \r\n        # Test leagues\r\n        try:\r\n            leagues = league_service.get_leagues()\r\n            results['leagues'] = {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'count': len(leagues),\r\n                'data': leagues[:5]  # First 5 for brevity\r\n            }\r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            results['leagues'] = {\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'error': str(e)\r\n            }\r\n        \r\n        # Test weeks (if we have a season and league)\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get-data-source')\r\ndef get_data_source():\r\n    try:\r\n        data_manager = DataManager()\r\n        # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n        data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': True,\r\n            'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n            'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n            'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n            'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n        }\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"ERROR: Exception in get_data_source: {e}\")\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': False,\r\n            'current_source': 'bowling_ergebnisse.csv',\r\n            'current_display_name': 'Simulated Data',\r\n            'available_sources': ['bowling_ergebnisse.csv', 'bowling_ergebnisse_real.csv'],\r\n            'message': f'Server error: {str(e)}'\r\n        }, 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get-data-source')\r\ndef get_data_source():\r\n    try:\r\n        data_manager = DataManager()\r\n        # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n        data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': True,\r\n            'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n            'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n            'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n            'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n        }\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"ERROR: Exception in get_data_source: {e}\")\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': False,\r\n            'current_source': 'bowling_ergebnisse.csv',\r\n            'current_display_name': 'Simulated Data',\r\n            'available_sources': ['bowling_ergebnisse.csv', 'bowling_ergebnisse_real.csv'],\r\n            'message': f'Server error: {str(e)}'\r\n        }, 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "@bp.route('/test-filter-endpoints')\r\ndef test_filter_endpoints():\n\r\n        ...\n\r\n        if season and league:\r\n            try:\r\n                weeks = league_service.get_weeks(league_name=league, season=season)\r\n                results['weeks'] = {\r\n                    'success': True,\r\n                    'count': len(weeks),\r\n                    'data': weeks[:5]  # First 5 for brevity\r\n                }\r\n            except Exception as e:\r\n                results['weeks'] = {\r\n                    'success': False,\r\n                    'error': str(e)\r\n                }\r\n        \r\n        # Test teams (if we have a season and league)\r\n        if season and league:\r\n            try:\r\n                teams = league_service.get_teams_in_league_season(league, season)\r\n                results['teams'] = {\r\n                    'success': True,\r\n                    'count': len(teams),\r\n                    'data': teams[:5]  # First 5 for brevity\r\n                }\r\n            except Exception as e:\r\n                results['teams'] = {\r\n                    'success': False,\r\n                    'error': str(e)\r\n                }\r\n        \r\n        # Test latest events\r\n        try:\r\n            events = league_service.get_latest_events(limit=3)\r\n            results['latest_events'] = {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'count': len(events),\r\n                'data': events\r\n            }\r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            results['latest_events'] = {\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'error': str(e)\r\n            }\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify({\r\n            'success': True,\r\n            'database': database,\r\n            'results': results,\r\n            'message': 'Filter endpoints tested successfully'\r\n        })\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: Error in test-filter-endpoints: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\r\n            'success': False,\r\n            'message': f'Error testing filter endpoints: {str(e)}'\r\n        }), 500",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 332,

_**User (2025-08-15 08:31:07Z)**_

the season 19/20 is inside the simulated data. that is not the issue. also we are querying for the league history, so the only fitler parameter is league anyway

---

_**Agent (2025-08-15 08:31:07Z)**_

You're absolutely right! The issue isn't with the season parameter. Since we're querying for "Liga Historie" (League History), the only filter parameter that matters is the league. Let me look at the league history endpoint and see what's going wrong with the data structure being returned.

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_league_history')\r\ndef get_league_history():\r\n    try:\r\n        # Get query parameters\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"League History - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new method that returns TableData\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_league_history_table_data(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        #print(\"::::::::::::::::::::::::::::\")\r\n        #print(table_data)\r\n        #print(\"::::::::::::::::::::::::::::\")\r\n        \r\n        # Convert to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "range": {

            "line": 58

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_team_history')\r\ndef get_team_history():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n            \r\n        # Example response structure:\r\n        # {\r\n        #     \"18/19\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga A\", \"final_position\": 3},\r\n        #     \"19/20\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga A\", \"final_position\": 8},\r\n        #     \"20/21\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga B\", \"final_position\": 1}\r\n        # }\r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name=team_name)\r\n\r\n        return jsonify(history)\r\n        \r\n\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_history: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_team_history')\r\ndef get_team_history():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n            \r\n        # Example response structure:\r\n        # {\r\n        #     \"18/19\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga A\", \"final_position\": 3},\r\n        #     \"19/20\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga A\", \"final_position\": 8},\r\n        #     \"20/21\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga B\", \"final_position\": 1}\r\n        # }\r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name=team_name)\r\n\r\n        return jsonify(history)\r\n        \r\n\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_history: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n# ==========================================\r\n# AGGREGATION ENDPOINTS (League-wide over time)\r\n# ==========================================\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_league_averages_history')\r\ndef get_league_averages_history():\r\n    \"\"\"Get league average scores across all seasons\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        \r\n        if not league:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameter: league'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"League Averages History - Received request with: league={league}\")\r\n        \r\n        debug = request.args.get('debug', 'false').lower() == 'true'\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        data = league_service.get_league_averages_history(league=league, debug=debug)\r\n        return jsonify(data)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_league_averages_history: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n# ==========================================\r\n# AGGREGATION ENDPOINTS (League-wide over time)\r\n# ==========================================\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_league_averages_history')\r\ndef get_league_averages_history():\r\n    \"\"\"Get league average scores across all seasons\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        \r\n        if not league:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameter: league'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"League Averages History - Received request with: league={league}\")\r\n        \r\n        debug = request.args.get('debug', 'false').lower() == 'true'\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        data = league_service.get_league_averages_history(league=league, debug=debug)\r\n        return jsonify(data)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_league_averages_history: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_points_to_win_history')\r\ndef get_points_to_win_history():\r\n    \"\"\"Get points needed to win the league across seasons\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        \r\n        if not league:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameter: league'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Points to Win History - Received request with: league={league}\")\r\n        \r\n        debug = request.args.get('debug', 'false').lower() == 'true'\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        data = league_service.get_points_to_win_history(league=league, debug=debug)\r\n        return jsonify(data)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_points_to_win_history: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_league_week_table')\r\ndef get_league_week_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        # week should be int\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        # print(\"get_league_week\")\r\n        print(f\"🔄 League Standings - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not season or not league:\r\n            return jsonify({\"error\": i18n_service.get_text(\"season_league_required\")}), 400\r\n\r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        # This now returns a TableData object\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n        \r\n        table_data = league_service.get_league_week_table_simple(season=season, league=league, week=week)\r\n        print(f\"✅ League week table data: {table_data.to_dict() if table_data else 'None'}\")\r\n        \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        #print(\"league_routes.get_league_week_table: \", end=\"\")\r\n        #print(table_data)\r\n        \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"❌ Error in get_league_week: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")  # This will show the full error trace\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_league_week_table')\r\ndef get_league_week_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        # week should be int\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        # print(\"get_league_week\")\r\n        print(f\"🔄 League Standings - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not season or not league:\r\n            return jsonify({\"error\": i18n_service.get_text(\"season_league_required\")}), 400\r\n\r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        # This now returns a TableData object\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n        \r\n        table_data = league_service.get_league_week_table_simple(season=season, league=league, week=week)\r\n        print(f\"✅ League week table data: {table_data.to_dict() if table_data else 'None'}\")\r\n        \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        #print(\"league_routes.get_league_week_table: \", end=\"\")\r\n        #print(table_data)\r\n        \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"❌ Error in get_league_week: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")  # This will show the full error trace\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_honor_scores')\r\ndef get_honor_scores():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"🔄 Honor Scores - Received request with: league={league}, season={season}, week={week}\")\r\n        \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n        \r\n        honor_scores = league_service.get_honor_scores(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            week=week, \r\n            number_of_individual_scores=3, \r\n            number_of_team_scores=3, \r\n            number_of_individual_averages=3, \r\n            number_of_team_averages=3\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"✅ Honor scores data: {honor_scores}\")\r\n        return jsonify(honor_scores)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"❌ Error in get_honor_scores: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_clutch_analysis')\r\ndef get_clutch_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league_name = request.args.get('league_name')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis called with team_name={team_name}, season={season}, league_name={league_name}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # If season is provided, derive league_name from team history\r\n        if season and season != '' and season != 'All':\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season in team_history:\r\n                league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n                print(f\"DEBUG: Derived league_name={league_name} from team history\")\r\n        \r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        clutch_data = team_service.get_clutch_performance(team_name=team_name, league_name=league_name, season=season if season and season != '' else None)\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis returned data with {len(clutch_data.get('opponent_clutch', {}))} opponents\")\r\n        return jsonify(clutch_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_clutch_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_clutch_analysis')\r\ndef get_clutch_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league_name = request.args.get('league_name')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis called with team_name={team_name}, season={season}, league_name={league_name}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # If season is provided, derive league_name from team history\r\n        if season and season != '' and season != 'All':\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season in team_history:\r\n                league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n                print(f\"DEBUG: Derived league_name={league_name} from team history\")\r\n        \r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        clutch_data = team_service.get_clutch_performance(team_name=team_name, league_name=league_name, season=season if season and season != '' else None)\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis returned data with {len(clutch_data.get('opponent_clutch', {}))} opponents\")\r\n        return jsonify(clutch_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_clutch_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r\nfrom app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service, Language\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport traceback\r\nfrom app.services.data_dict import DataDict\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('league', __name__)\r\n\r\ndef get_league_service():\r\n    \"\"\"Helper function to get LeagueService with database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    database = request.args.get('database')\r\n    print(f\"🔄 get_league_service called with database: {database}\")\r\n    league_service = LeagueService(database=database)\r\n    print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n    return league_service",

        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r\nfrom app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service, Language\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport traceback\r\nfrom app.services.data_dict import DataDict\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('league', __name__)\r\n\r\ndef get_league_service():\r\n    \"\"\"Helper function to get LeagueService with database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    database = request.args.get('database')\r\n    print(f\"🔄 get_league_service called with database: {database}\")\r\n    league_service = LeagueService(database=database)\r\n    print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n    return league_service",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_details_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Details Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_details_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team,\r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_details_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,

            "lineNumber": 158,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_details_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Details Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_details_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team,\r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_details_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",
        "range": {

            "line": 232
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 142
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_head_to_head_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        view_mode = request.args.get('view_mode', 'own_team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Head-to-Head Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week_str}, team={team}, view_mode={view_mode}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week,\r\n            view_mode=view_mode\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_head_to_head_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",
