        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_head_to_head_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        view_mode = request.args.get('view_mode', 'own_team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Head-to-Head Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week_str}, team={team}, view_mode={view_mode}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week,\r\n            view_mode=view_mode\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_head_to_head_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_margin_analysis')\r\ndef get_margin_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Determine scope based on parameters\r\n        if season and season != '':\r\n            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season not in team_history:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r\n            \r\n            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, league_name, season)\r\n        else:\r\n            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, None, None)\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify(margin_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_margin_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_positions')\r\ndef get_team_positions():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n           \r\n\r\n        print(f\"Team Positions - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}\")\r\n        if not all([season, league]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n            \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        positions = league_service.get_team_positions_simple(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        #print(positions)\r\n        return jsonify(positions)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_positions: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(traceback.format_exc())\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_points_vs_average')\r\ndef get_team_points_vs_average():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n           \r\n\r\n        print(f\"Team Points vs Average - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}\")\r\n        if not all([season, league]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n            \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        points_data = league_service.get_team_points_during_season(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n\r\n        averages_data = league_service.get_team_averages_simple(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n       \r\n        # Extract data from the new SeriesData structure\r\n        points_raw = points_data[\"data\"]\r\n        averages_raw = averages_data[\"data\"]\r\n\r\n        points_vs_average = dict()\r\n\r\n        for team, points in points_raw.items():\r\n            averages = averages_raw[team]\r\n            points_vs_average[team] = [[averages[i] , points[i]] for i in range(len(points))]\r\n       \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        #print(points_vs_average)    \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        return jsonify(points_vs_average)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_points_vs_average: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(traceback.format_exc())\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "@bp.route('/league/get_team_points_vs_average')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "def get_team_points_vs_average():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "    try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "        season = request.args.get('season')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "        league = request.args.get('league')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "           \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "        print(f\"Team Points vs Average - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "        if not all([season, league]):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "        league_service = get_league_service()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "        points_data = league_service.get_team_points_during_season(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "            league_name=league,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "            season=season\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "        )\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "        averages_data = league_service.get_team_averages_simple(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "            league_name=league,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "            season=season\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "        )\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "       \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "        # Extract data from the new SeriesData structure\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "        points_raw = points_data[\"data\"]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "        averages_raw = averages_data[\"data\"]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "        points_vs_average = dict()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "        for team, points in points_raw.items():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "            averages = averages_raw[team]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "            points_vs_average[team] = [[averages[i] , points[i]] for i in range(len(points))]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "       \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "        #print(\"############################\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "        #print(points_vs_average)    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "        #print(\"############################\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "        return jsonify(points_vs_average)\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "    except Exception as e:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "        print(f\"Error in get_team_points_vs_average: {str(e)}\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "        print(traceback.format_exc())\r"
          },

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_points_vs_average')\r\ndef get_team_points_vs_average():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n           \r\n\r\n        print(f\"Team Points vs Average - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}\")\r\n        if not all([season, league]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n            \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        points_data = league_service.get_team_points_during_season(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n\r\n        averages_data = league_service.get_team_averages_simple(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n       \r\n        # Extract data from the new SeriesData structure\r\n        points_raw = points_data[\"data\"]\r\n        averages_raw = averages_data[\"data\"]\r\n\r\n        points_vs_average = dict()\r\n\r\n        for team, points in points_raw.items():\r\n            averages = averages_raw[team]\r\n            points_vs_average[team] = [[averages[i] , points[i]] for i in range(len(points))]\r\n       \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        #print(points_vs_average)    \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        return jsonify(points_vs_average)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_points_vs_average: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(traceback.format_exc())\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_team_history')\r\ndef get_team_history():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n            \r\n        # Example response structure:\r\n        # {\r\n        #     \"18/19\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga A\", \"final_position\": 3},\r\n        #     \"19/20\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga A\", \"final_position\": 8},\r\n        #     \"20/21\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga B\", \"final_position\": 1}\r\n        # }\r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name=team_name)\r\n\r\n        return jsonify(history)\r\n        \r\n\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_history: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "@bp.route('/team/get_available_weeks')\r"
          },

            "text": "\r"
          },

            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "@bp.route('/team/get_team_history')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "def get_team_history():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "        if not team_name:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "        # Example response structure:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "        # {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "        #     \"18/19\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga A\", \"final_position\": 3},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "        #     \"19/20\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga A\", \"final_position\": 8},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "        #     \"20/21\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga B\", \"final_position\": 1}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "        # }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "        team_service = get_team_service()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "        history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name=team_name)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "        return jsonify(history)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_team_history')\r\ndef get_team_history():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n            \r\n        # Example response structure:\r\n        # {\r\n        #     \"18/19\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga A\", \"final_position\": 3},\r\n        #     \"19/20\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga A\", \"final_position\": 8},\r\n        #     \"20/21\": {\"league_name\": \"Liga B\", \"final_position\": 1}\r\n        # }\r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name=team_name)\r\n\r\n        return jsonify(history)\r\n        \r\n\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_history: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_clutch_analysis')\r\ndef get_clutch_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league_name = request.args.get('league_name')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis called with team_name={team_name}, season={season}, league_name={league_name}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # If season is provided, derive league_name from team history\r\n        if season and season != '' and season != 'All':\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season in team_history:\r\n                league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n                print(f\"DEBUG: Derived league_name={league_name} from team history\")\r\n        \r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        clutch_data = team_service.get_clutch_performance(team_name=team_name, league_name=league_name, season=season if season and season != '' else None)\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis returned data with {len(clutch_data.get('opponent_clutch', {}))} opponents\")\r\n        return jsonify(clutch_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_clutch_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_clutch_analysis')\r\ndef get_clutch_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league_name = request.args.get('league_name')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis called with team_name={team_name}, season={season}, league_name={league_name}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # If season is provided, derive league_name from team history\r\n        if season and season != '' and season != 'All':\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season in team_history:\r\n                league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n                print(f\"DEBUG: Derived league_name={league_name} from team history\")\r\n        \r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        clutch_data = team_service.get_clutch_performance(team_name=team_name, league_name=league_name, season=season if season and season != '' else None)\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis returned data with {len(clutch_data.get('opponent_clutch', {}))} opponents\")\r\n        return jsonify(clutch_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_clutch_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_top_team_performances')\r\ndef get_top_team_performances():\r\n    \"\"\"Get top team performances across all seasons\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        \r\n        if not league:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameter: league'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Top Team Performances - Received request with: league={league}\")\r\n        \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_top_team_performances(league=league)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_top_team_performances: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_top_team_performances')\r\ndef get_top_team_performances():\r\n    \"\"\"Get top team performances across all seasons\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        \r\n        if not league:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameter: league'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Top Team Performances - Received request with: league={league}\")\r\n        \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_top_team_performances(league=league)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_top_team_performances: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_consistency_metrics')\r\ndef get_consistency_metrics():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Determine scope based on parameters\r\n        if season and season != '':\r\n            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season not in team_history:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r\n            \r\n            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n            consistency_data = team_service.get_consistency_metrics(team_name, league_name, season)\r\n        else:\r\n            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            consistency_data = team_service.get_consistency_metrics(team_name, None, None)\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify(consistency_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_consistency_metrics: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_league_comparison')\r\ndef get_league_comparison():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        comparison_data = team_service.get_league_comparison_data(team_name=team_name)\r\n        #print(comparison_data)\r\n        return jsonify(comparison_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_league_comparison: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_margin_analysis')\r\ndef get_margin_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Determine scope based on parameters\r\n        if season and season != '':\r\n            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season not in team_history:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r\n            \r\n            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, league_name, season)\r\n        else:\r\n            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, None, None)\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify(margin_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_margin_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_margin_analysis')\r\ndef get_margin_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Determine scope based on parameters\r\n        if season and season != '':\r\n            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season not in team_history:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r\n            \r\n            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, league_name, season)\r\n        else:\r\n            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, None, None)\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify(margin_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_margin_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_record_team_games')\r\ndef get_record_team_games():\r\n    \"\"\"Get record team games (highest scoring team performances)\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        \r\n        if not league:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameter: league'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Record Team Games - Received request with: league={league}\")\r\n        \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_record_team_games(league=league)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_record_team_games: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_available_weeks')\r\ndef get_available_weeks():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n\r\n        if not all([team_name, season]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n\r\n        print(f\"Team Route: Get Available Weeks - Received request with: team_name={team_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        return jsonify(team_service.get_available_weeks(team_name=team_name, season=season))\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_available_seasons: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_available_weeks')\r\ndef get_available_weeks():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n\r\n        if not all([team_name, season]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n\r\n        print(f\"Team Route: Get Available Weeks - Received request with: team_name={team_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        return jsonify(team_service.get_available_weeks(team_name=team_name, season=season))\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_available_seasons: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_head_to_head_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        view_mode = request.args.get('view_mode', 'own_team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Head-to-Head Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week_str}, team={team}, view_mode={view_mode}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week,\r\n            view_mode=view_mode\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_head_to_head_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/player/\u003canalysis\u003e')\r\ndef player_stats(analysis):\r\n    season = session.get('selected_season', 'all')\r\n    return render_template('player/content.html', analysis=analysis, season=season)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_clutch_analysis')\r\ndef get_clutch_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league_name = request.args.get('league_name')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis called with team_name={team_name}, season={season}, league_name={league_name}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # If season is provided, derive league_name from team history\r\n        if season and season != '' and season != 'All':\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season in team_history:\r\n                league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n                print(f\"DEBUG: Derived league_name={league_name} from team history\")\r\n        \r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        clutch_data = team_service.get_clutch_performance(team_name=team_name, league_name=league_name, season=season if season and season != '' else None)\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis returned data with {len(clutch_data.get('opponent_clutch', {}))} opponents\")\r\n        return jsonify(clutch_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_clutch_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "@bp.route('/team/get_special_matches')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 91,

          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\r"

            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500\r"

            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "@bp.route('/team/get_clutch_analysis')\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r"

            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "        season = request.args.get('season')\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 116,

            "lineNumber": 117,

            "lineNumber": 120,

            "lineNumber": 121,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,

          },

            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "        # If season is provided, derive league_name from team history\r"

          },

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_clutch_analysis')\r\ndef get_clutch_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league_name = request.args.get('league_name')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis called with team_name={team_name}, season={season}, league_name={league_name}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # If season is provided, derive league_name from team history\r\n        if season and season != '' and season != 'All':\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season in team_history:\r\n                league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n                print(f\"DEBUG: Derived league_name={league_name} from team history\")\r\n        \r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        clutch_data = team_service.get_clutch_performance(team_name=team_name, league_name=league_name, season=season if season and season != '' else None)\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_clutch_analysis returned data with {len(clutch_data.get('opponent_clutch', {}))} opponents\")\r\n        return jsonify(clutch_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_clutch_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_league_comparison')\r\ndef get_league_comparison():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        comparison_data = team_service.get_league_comparison_data(team_name=team_name)\r\n        #print(comparison_data)\r\n        return jsonify(comparison_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_league_comparison: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get_lifetime_stats')\r\ndef get_lifetime_stats():\r\n   \r\n    player_name = request.args.get('player_name')\r\n    \r\n    if not player_name:\r\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Player name is required'}), 400\r\n    \r\n    print(f\"Player Route: Get Lifetime Stats - Received request with: player_name={player_name}\")\r\n    \r\n    player_service = get_player_service()\r\n    stats = player_service.get_lifetime_stats(player_name)  # This will now return both lifetime and season stats\r\n    \r\n    return jsonify(stats)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_consistency_metrics')\r\ndef get_consistency_metrics():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Determine scope based on parameters\r\n        if season and season != '':\r\n            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season not in team_history:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r\n            \r\n            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n            consistency_data = team_service.get_consistency_metrics(team_name, league_name, season)\r\n        else:\r\n            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            consistency_data = team_service.get_consistency_metrics(team_name, None, None)\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify(consistency_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_consistency_metrics: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "@bp.route('/team/get_clutch_analysis')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 112,

          },

            "text": "        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500\r"

            "text": "def get_consistency_metrics():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    try:\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "        if not team_name:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "        # Determine scope based on parameters\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "        if season and season != '':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "            team_service = get_team_service()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "            if season not in team_history:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "            consistency_data = team_service.get_consistency_metrics(team_name, league_name, season)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "        else:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "            team_service = get_team_service()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "            consistency_data = team_service.get_consistency_metrics(team_name, None, None)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "        return jsonify(consistency_data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "    except Exception as e:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_consistency_metrics')\r\ndef get_consistency_metrics():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Determine scope based on parameters\r\n        if season and season != '':\r\n            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season not in team_history:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r\n            \r\n            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n            consistency_data = team_service.get_consistency_metrics(team_name, league_name, season)\r\n        else:\r\n            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            consistency_data = team_service.get_consistency_metrics(team_name, None, None)\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify(consistency_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_consistency_metrics: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_special_matches')\r\ndef get_special_matches():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_special_matches called with team_name={team_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Use unified method that handles both cases\r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        special_matches = team_service.get_special_matches(team_name=team_name, season=season if season and season != '' else None)\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_special_matches returned {len(special_matches)} matches\")\r\n        return jsonify(special_matches)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_special_matches: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_special_matches')\r\ndef get_special_matches():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_special_matches called with team_name={team_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Use unified method that handles both cases\r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        special_matches = team_service.get_special_matches(team_name=team_name, season=season if season and season != '' else None)\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"DEBUG: get_special_matches returned {len(special_matches)} matches\")\r\n        return jsonify(special_matches)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_special_matches: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_margin_analysis')\r\ndef get_margin_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Determine scope based on parameters\r\n        if season and season != '':\r\n            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season not in team_history:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r\n            \r\n            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, league_name, season)\r\n        else:\r\n            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, None, None)\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify(margin_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_margin_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

            "text": "        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "        if not team_name:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "        # Determine scope based on parameters\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "        if season and season != '':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "            team_service = get_team_service()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "            if season not in team_history:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, league_name, season)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "        else:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "            team_service = get_team_service()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, None, None)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "        return jsonify(margin_data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "    except Exception as e:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "        print(f\"Error in get_margin_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "@bp.route('/team/get_league_comparison')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "def get_league_comparison():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "    try"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_margin_analysis')\r\ndef get_margin_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Determine scope based on parameters\r\n        if season and season != '':\r\n            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season not in team_history:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r\n            \r\n            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, league_name, season)\r\n        else:\r\n            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r\n            team_service = get_team_service()\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, None, None)\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify(margin_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_margin_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "range": {

          },

            "line": 139
          }
        },

    }

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r\nfrom app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service, Language\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport traceback\r\nfrom app.services.data_dict import DataDict\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('league', __name__)\r\n\r\ndef get_league_service():\r\n    \"\"\"Helper function to get LeagueService with database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    database = request.args.get('database')\r\n    print(f\"🔄 get_league_service called with database: {database}\")\r\n    league_service = LeagueService(database=database)\r\n    print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n    return league_service",

        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r\nfrom app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service, Language\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport traceback\r\nfrom app.services.data_dict import DataDict\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('league', __name__)\r\n\r\ndef get_league_service():\r\n    \"\"\"Helper function to get LeagueService with database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    database = request.args.get('database')\r\n    print(f\"🔄 get_league_service called with database: {database}\")\r\n    league_service = LeagueService(database=database)\r\n    print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n    return league_service",

        "contents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, session, redirect, url_for, request, jsonify\r\nfrom data_access.pd_dataframes import fetch_column\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nimport datetime\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('main', __name__)\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/')\r\ndef index():\r\n    return render_template('index.html')",

            "lineNumber": 8,

        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, session, redirect, url_for, request, jsonify\r\nfrom data_access.pd_dataframes import fetch_column\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nimport datetime\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('main', __name__)\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/')\r\ndef index():\r\n    return render_template('index.html')",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_individual_averages')\r\ndef get_individual_averages():\r\n    \"\"\"Get individual player averages for a season, optionally filtered by week and/or team\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')  # Optional parameter\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')  # Optional parameter\r\n        \r\n        if not all([league, season]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters: league, season'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Parse week if provided\r\n        week = None\r\n        if week_str:\r\n            try:\r\n                week = int(week_str)\r\n            except ValueError:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid week parameter: must be an integer'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        filter_info = \"\"\r\n        if week is not None:\r\n            filter_info += f\", week={week}\"\r\n        if team is not None:\r\n            filter_info += f\", team={team}\"\r\n        print(f\"🔄 Individual Averages - Received request with: league={league}, season={season}{filter_info}\")\r\n        \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_individual_averages(league=league, season=season, week=week, team=team)\r\n        print(f\"✅ Individual averages data: {table_data.to_dict() if table_data else 'None'}\")\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"❌ Error in get_individual_averages: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 657,

          },

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_individual_averages')\r\ndef get_individual_averages():\r\n    \"\"\"Get individual player averages for a season, optionally filtered by week and/or team\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')  # Optional parameter\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')  # Optional parameter\r\n        \r\n        if not all([league, season]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters: league, season'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Parse week if provided\r\n        week = None\r\n        if week_str:\r\n            try:\r\n                week = int(week_str)\r\n            except ValueError:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid week parameter: must be an integer'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        filter_info = \"\"\r\n        if week is not None:\r\n            filter_info += f\", week={week}\"\r\n        if team is not None:\r\n            filter_info += f\", team={team}\"\r\n        print(f\"🔄 Individual Averages - Received request with: league={league}, season={season}{filter_info}\")\r\n        \r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        print(f\"✅ LeagueService created with database: {getattr(league_service, 'database', 'None')}\")\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_individual_averages(league=league, season=season, week=week, team=team)\r\n        print(f\"✅ Individual averages data: {table_data.to_dict() if table_data else 'None'}\")\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"❌ Error in get_individual_averages: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "contents": "@bp.route('/get-data-sources-info')\n\r\n\r\n...\n\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/reload-data')\r\ndef reload_data():\r\n    data_source = request.args.get('source', 'bowling_ergebnisse.csv')\r\n    print(f\"DEBUG: Reloading data with source: {data_source}\")\r\n    \r\n    try:\r\n        data_manager = DataManager()\r\n        # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n        data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n        \r\n        # Validate the requested source\r\n        if not data_manager.validate_source(data_source):\r\n            return {\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': f'Invalid or inaccessible data source: {data_source}',\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }, 400\r\n        \r\n        # Attempt to reload data\r\n        success = data_manager.reload_data(data_source)\r\n        \r\n        if success:\r\n            print(f\"DEBUG: DataManager current source: {data_manager.current_source}\")\r\n            return {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n                'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n                'message': f'Data source switched to {data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source)}',\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }\r\n        else:\r\n            return {\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': f'Failed to switch to {data_source}, rolled back to previous source',\r\n                'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n                'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }, 500",

Excellent! I have successfully added all the requested example links to the front page. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## ✅ Added Example Links

### **League Examples (existing):**
1. **Liga Historie (simuliert): LL 1 Nord** → League stats without season filter
2. **Liga Saison (simuliert): BZOL 2 Nord - 21/22** → League stats for specific season/league
3. **Liga Spieltag (simuliert): BayL - 23/24 - Week 3** → League stats for specific week
4. **Liga Spieltag (reale Daten): BayL - 24/25 - week 1** → Real data league stats
5. **Liga Spielzettel (reale Daten): BayL - 24/25 - week 1 - BK München 3** → Real data with team filter

### **Team Examples (newly added):**
6. **Team Historie (simuliert): Aschaffenburg 3** → Team stats page with simulated data
7. **Team Saison (simuliert): Aschaffenburg 3 - 23/24** → Team stats for specific season
8. **Team Historie (real): Bowlinghaus Bamberg 1** → Team stats page with real data

### **Player Examples (newly added):**
9. **Spieler Statistiken (simuliert): Matthew Davis** → Player stats page with simulated data
10. **Spieler Statistiken (real): Altenfeld, Marco** → Player stats page with real data

## 🔧 Technical Implementation:

- **Smart URL routing**: The JavaScript automatically detects the type of example and routes to the correct page:
  - Links containing "Spieler Statistiken" → `{{ url_for('player.stats') }}`
  - Links containing "Team" → `{{ url_for('team.stats') }}`
  - All others → `{{ url_for('league.stats') }}`

- **Database parameter**: All examples include the correct database parameter (`bowling_ergebnisse.csv` for simulated data, `bowling_ergebnisse_real.csv` for real data)

- **Data validation**: All teams and players used in examples have been verified to exist in their respective databases:
  - ✅ Aschaffenburg 3 exists in simulated data
  - ✅ Matthew Davis exists in simulated data
  - ✅ Bowlinghaus Bamberg 1 exists in real data
  - ✅ Altenfeld, Marco exists in real data

The examples now provide comprehensive demonstration of all major functionality areas (league, team, and player statistics) using both simulated and real data sources.

---

            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "            .catch(error =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "                "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    function loadPlayerStats(playerName) {\r\n        console.log(\"loadPlayerStats: \" + playerName);\r\n        fetchWithDatabase(&#96;{{ url_for(\"player.get_lifetime_stats\") }}?player_name=${playerName}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(data =\u003e {\r\n                // Check if data is null or missing required properties\r\n                if (!data || !data.lifetime || !data.seasons) {\r\n                    console.error('Invalid or missing player data:', data);\r\n                    // Display error message to user\r\n                    document.getElementById('playerStats').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                        \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-warning\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003cstrong\u003eNo data available\u003c/strong\u003e for player \"${playerName}\" in the selected database.\r\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    &#96;;\r\n                    // Clear other sections\r\n                    document.getElementById('lifetimeGames').textContent = '-';\r\n                    document.getElementById('lifetimePins').textContent = '-';\r\n                    document.getElementById('lifetimeAvg').textContent = '-';\r\n                    document.getElementById('bestGame').textContent = '-';\r\n                    document.getElementById('bestGameEvent').textContent = '-';\r\n                    document.getElementById('bestGameDate').textContent = '-';\r\n                    document.getElementById('bestSeason').textContent = '-';\r\n                    document.getElementById('mostImproved').textContent = '-';\r\n                    document.getElementById('seasonStatsBody').innerHTML = '';\r\n                    return;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                displayLifetimeStats(data.lifetime);\r\n                displaySeasonStats(data.seasons);\r\n                updateTrendChart(data);  // We'll keep the existing chart functionality\r\n            })\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 16,
            "line": 181
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 146
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/player/content.html"
      },
      "score": 0.4150390625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class TeamStatsApp {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    async _doInitialize() {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Signal that we're taking control to prevent legacy conflicts\r\n            window.teamStatsApp = this;\r\n            this.isInitialized = true;\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize URL state manager with content rendering callback\r\n            this.urlStateManager = new URLStateManager({\r\n                onStateChange: (state) =\u003e {\r\n                    console.log('🔄 URLStateManager: State changed:', state);\r\n                    if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                        this.contentRenderer.renderContent(state);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize event system\r\n            this.eventBus = window.EventBus;\r\n            this.smartEventRouter = new SmartEventRouter(this.eventBus);\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize content renderer\r\n            this.contentRenderer = new ContentRenderer(this.urlStateManager, this.eventBus, this.smartEventRouter);\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize filter manager with a short delay to ensure DOM is ready\r\n            await new Promise(resolve =\u003e setTimeout(resolve, 100));\r\n            \r\n            this.filterManager = new FilterManager(this.urlStateManager, this.eventBus, this.smartEventRouter);\r\n            await this.filterManager.initialize();\r\n            \r\n            // Set up our own event listeners that properly trigger state changes\r\n            this.setupEventListeners();\r\n            \r\n            console.log('✅ TeamStatsApp initialized successfully');",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    async _doInitialize() {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Signal that we're taking control to prevent legacy conflicts\r\n            window.teamStatsApp = this;\r\n            this.isInitialized = true;\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize URL state manager with content rendering callback\r\n            this.urlStateManager = new URLStateManager({\r\n                onStateChange: (state) =\u003e {\r\n                    console.log('🔄 URLStateManager: State changed:', state);\r\n                    if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                        this.contentRenderer.renderContent(state);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize event system\r\n            this.eventBus = window.EventBus;\r\n            this.smartEventRouter = new SmartEventRouter(this.eventBus);\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize content renderer\r\n            this.contentRenderer = new ContentRenderer(this.urlStateManager, this.eventBus, this.smartEventRouter);\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize filter manager with a short delay to ensure DOM is ready\r\n            await new Promise(resolve =\u003e setTimeout(resolve, 100));\r\n            \r\n            this.filterManager = new FilterManager(this.urlStateManager, this.eventBus, this.smartEventRouter);\r\n            await this.filterManager.initialize();\r\n            \r\n            // Set up our own event listeners that properly trigger state changes\r\n            this.setupEventListeners();\r\n            \r\n            console.log('✅ TeamStatsApp initialized successfully');",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueStatsApp {\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    async initialize() {\r\n        try {\r\n            console.log('🚀 Initializing LeagueStatsApp...');\r\n            \r\n            // Get initial state from URL (URLStateManager initializes in constructor)\r\n            this.currentState = { ...this.currentState, ...this.urlStateManager.getState() };\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize content blocks\r\n            await this.initializeContentBlocks();\r\n            \r\n            // Set up event listeners\r\n            this.setupEventListeners();\r\n            \r\n            // Initial render\r\n            await this.renderContent();\r\n            \r\n            console.log('✅ LeagueStatsApp initialized successfully');\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('❌ Error initializing LeagueStatsApp:', error);\r\n            throw error;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    async initialize() {\r\n        try {\r\n            console.log('🚀 Initializing LeagueStatsApp...');\r\n            \r\n            // Get initial state from URL (URLStateManager initializes in constructor)\r\n            this.currentState = { ...this.currentState, ...this.urlStateManager.getState() };\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize content blocks\r\n            await this.initializeContentBlocks();\r\n            \r\n            // Set up event listeners\r\n            this.setupEventListeners();\r\n            \r\n            // Initial render\r\n            await this.renderContent();\r\n            \r\n            console.log('✅ LeagueStatsApp initialized successfully');\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('❌ Error initializing LeagueStatsApp:', error);\r\n            throw error;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    const playerInput = document.getElementById('playerInput');\r\n    const playerList = document.getElementById('playerList');\r\n    \r\n    // Load all players immediately\r\n    fetchWithDatabase('{{ url_for(\"player.search_players\") }}')\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(players =\u003e {\r\n            // Populate datalist with options\r\n            playerList.innerHTML = players.map(player =\u003e \r\n                &#96;\u003coption value=\"${player.name}\" data-id=\"${player.id}\"\u003e&#96;\r\n            ).join('');\r\n        });\r\n\r\n    // Handle player selection\r\n    playerInput.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n        const selectedName = this.value;\r\n        const option = Array.from(playerList.options).find(opt =\u003e opt.value === selectedName);\r\n        \r\n        if (option) {\r\n            const playerName = option.dataset.id;\r\n            loadPlayerStats(playerName);\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        ],
        "originalContents": "document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    const playerInput = document.getElementById('playerInput');\r\n    const playerList = document.getElementById('playerList');\r\n    \r\n    // Load all players immediately\r\n    fetchWithDatabase('{{ url_for(\"player.search_players\") }}')\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(players =\u003e {\r\n            // Populate datalist with options\r\n            playerList.innerHTML = players.map(player =\u003e \r\n                &#96;\u003coption value=\"${player.name}\" data-id=\"${player.id}\"\u003e&#96;\r\n            ).join('');\r\n        });\r\n\r\n    // Handle player selection\r\n    playerInput.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n        const selectedName = this.value;\r\n        const option = Array.from(playerList.options).find(opt =\u003e opt.value === selectedName);\r\n        \r\n        if (option) {\r\n            const playerName = option.dataset.id;\r\n            loadPlayerStats(playerName);\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class APITestApp {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    async _doInitialize() {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Initialize URL state manager with API test parameters\r\n            this.urlStateManager = new URLStateManager({\r\n                onStateChange: (state) =\u003e {\r\n                    console.log('API Test URL state changed:', state);\r\n                    this.currentState = { ...this.currentState, ...state };\r\n                    \r\n                    // Update global currentState for legacy compatibility\r\n                    if (typeof window.currentState !== 'undefined') {\r\n                        Object.assign(window.currentState, state);\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        window.currentState = { ...this.currentState };\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                        this.contentRenderer.renderContent(this.currentState);\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Update filter controls\r\n                    this.updateFilterDisplays();\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            // Get initial state from URL\r\n            this.currentState = { ...this.currentState, ...this.urlStateManager.getState() };\r\n            window.currentState = { ...this.currentState };\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize content renderer\r\n            this.contentRenderer = new APITestContentRenderer(this.urlStateManager);\r\n            \r\n            // Load initial filter options\r\n            await this.loadInitialData();\r\n            \r\n            // Render initial content\r\n            await this.contentRenderer.renderContent(this.currentState);\r\n            \r\n            // Setup filter event listeners\r\n            this.setupFilterEventListeners();\r\n            \r\n            this.isInitialized = true;\r\n            console.log('✅ APITestApp initialized successfully');\r\n            \r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('❌ Failed to initialize APITestApp:', error);\r\n            throw error;\r\n        }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    async _doInitialize() {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Initialize URL state manager with API test parameters\r\n            this.urlStateManager = new URLStateManager({\r\n                onStateChange: (state) =\u003e {\r\n                    console.log('API Test URL state changed:', state);\r\n                    this.currentState = { ...this.currentState, ...state };\r\n                    \r\n                    // Update global currentState for legacy compatibility\r\n                    if (typeof window.currentState !== 'undefined') {\r\n                        Object.assign(window.currentState, state);\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        window.currentState = { ...this.currentState };\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                        this.contentRenderer.renderContent(this.currentState);\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Update filter controls\r\n                    this.updateFilterDisplays();\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            // Get initial state from URL\r\n            this.currentState = { ...this.currentState, ...this.urlStateManager.getState() };\r\n            window.currentState = { ...this.currentState };\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize content renderer\r\n            this.contentRenderer = new APITestContentRenderer(this.urlStateManager);\r\n            \r\n            // Load initial filter options\r\n            await this.loadInitialData();\r\n            \r\n            // Render initial content\r\n            await this.contentRenderer.renderContent(this.currentState);\r\n            \r\n            // Setup filter event listeners\r\n            this.setupFilterEventListeners();\r\n            \r\n            this.isInitialized = true;\r\n            console.log('✅ APITestApp initialized successfully');\r\n            \r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('❌ Failed to initialize APITestApp:', error);\r\n            throw error;\r\n        }",
        "range": {

            "column": 3,

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\r\n * LeagueStatsApp - Main application coordinator for league statistics page\r\n * Manages content blocks and state synchronization\r\n */\r\nclass LeagueStatsApp {\r\n    constructor() {\r\n        this.contentBlocks = new Map();\r\n        this.currentState = {\r\n            season: null,\r\n            league: null,\r\n            week: null,\r\n            team: null\r\n        };\r\n        this.urlStateManager = new URLStateManager();\r\n        this.contentRenderer = new LeagueStatsContentRenderer();\r\n        \r\n        // Debouncing for content updates\r\n        this.contentUpdateTimeout = null;\r\n        this.isRenderingContent = false;\r\n    }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "/**\r"
          },

        "originalContents": "/**\r\n * LeagueStatsApp - Main application coordinator for league statistics page\r\n * Manages content blocks and state synchronization\r\n */\r\nclass LeagueStatsApp {\r\n    constructor() {\r\n        this.contentBlocks = new Map();\r\n        this.currentState = {\r\n            season: null,\r\n            league: null,\r\n            week: null,\r\n            team: null\r\n        };\r\n        this.urlStateManager = new URLStateManager();\r\n        this.contentRenderer = new LeagueStatsContentRenderer();\r\n        \r\n        // Debouncing for content updates\r\n        this.contentUpdateTimeout = null;\r\n        this.isRenderingContent = false;\r\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 170
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/static/js/league-stats-app.js"
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// Global initialization\r\nlet leagueStatsApp;\r\n\r\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async () =\u003e {\r\n    try {\r\n        console.log('📄 DOM loaded, initializing LeagueStatsApp...');\r\n        \r\n        leagueStatsApp = new LeagueStatsApp();\r\n        await leagueStatsApp.initialize();\r\n        \r\n        // Make app globally accessible for debugging\r\n        window.leagueStatsApp = leagueStatsApp;\r\n        \r\n    } catch (error) {\r\n        console.error('❌ Failed to initialize LeagueStatsApp:', error);\r\n        \r\n        // Show error message to user\r\n        const container = document.querySelector('.container-fluid');\r\n        if (container) {\r\n            container.innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\" role=\"alert\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch4 class=\"alert-heading\"\u003eInitialization Error\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n                    \u003cp\u003eFailed to initialize the league statistics application. Please refresh the page.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                    \u003chr\u003e\r\n                    \u003cp class=\"mb-0\"\u003eError: ${error.message}\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            &#96;;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n});",
